views.name: vw_attribute_value_table
views.definition:
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_attribute_value_table]
AS
SELECT TOP (1000)
    av.[id],
	a.[id] AS [attribute_id],
    CONCAT(a.plant_cd, ' - ', a.attribute_cd) AS [attribute],
    av.[attribute_value] AS [attribute_value],
    a.[plant_cd] AS [plant_cd] , --used purely to filer out attribute values from your selected plant, will not be used to visually show in the table.
    av.[is_active] AS [is_active],
    av.[created_date] AS [created_date],
    av.[last_edit_date] AS [last_edit_date],
    av.[last_edit_user_cd] AS [last_edit_user_cd]
FROM [ipc].[attribute_value] av
INNER JOIN [ipc].[attribute] a ON av.[attribute_id] = a.[id];

views.name: vw_current_offline_lot
views.definition:
-- used for header in data entry screen

CREATE  VIEW [ipc].[vw_current_offline_lot]
 AS
 SELECT lot.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    isnull(mach.equipment_cd,mach_shiplot.equipment_cd) AS "MachineCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    mat.material_cd AS "MaterialCd",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    mat.size_design_cd AS "SizeDesignCd",
    sd.description AS "SizeDesignDescr",
    mat.body_color_cd AS "BodyColorCd",
    mat.body_color_cd AS "BodyColorDescr",
    mat.cap_color_cd AS "CapColorCd",
    mat.cap_color_cd AS "CapyColorDescr",
    mat.polymer_cd AS "PolymerCd",
    pol.description AS "PolymerDescr",
    mat.weight_spec_cd AS "WeightSpecCd",
    ws.description AS "WeightSpecDescription"
   FROM  sub.lot lot 
	 LEFT JOIN sub.process_order po ON po.lot_id = lot.id -- tet the process order from the lot
     LEFT JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id AND pos.step_cd = 'HCM' --AND pos.process_order_step_status_cd = 'Running';
	 LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
	 
	 LEFT JOIN sub.process_order po_shiplot ON po_shiplot.ship_lot_id = lot.id   ---get the process order from the ship lot
     LEFT JOIN sub.process_order_step pos_shiplot ON po_shiplot.id = pos_shiplot.process_order_id AND pos_shiplot.step_cd = 'HCM' --AND pos.process_order_step_status_cd = 'Running';
	 LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach_shiplot ON mach_shiplot.id = pos_shiplot.equipment_id

     JOIN mas.material mat ON lot.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = lot.plant_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.polymer pol ON pol.polymer_cd = mat.polymer_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.size_design sd ON sd.size_design_cd = mat.size_design_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.weight_spec ws ON ws.weight_spec_cd = mat.weight_spec_cd
     
    
  WHERE  1 = 1

views.name: vw_current_running_lot
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_current_running_lot

-- DROP VIEW ipc.vw_current_running_lot;

CREATE  VIEW [ipc].[vw_current_running_lot]
 AS
 SELECT po.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    mach.equipment_cd AS "MachineCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    mat.material_cd AS "MaterialCd",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    mat.size_design_cd AS "SizeDesignCd",
    sd.description AS "SizeDesignDescr",
    mat.body_color_cd AS "BodyColorCd",
    mat.body_color_cd AS "BodyColorDescr",
    mat.cap_color_cd AS "CapColorCd",
    mat.cap_color_cd AS "CapyColorDescr",
    mat.polymer_cd AS "PolymerCd",
    pol.description AS "PolymerDescr",
    mat.weight_spec_cd AS "WeightSpecCd",
    ws.description AS "WeightSpecDescription"
   FROM sub.process_order po
     JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id
     JOIN mas.material mat ON po.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.polymer pol ON pol.polymer_cd = mat.polymer_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.size_design sd ON sd.size_design_cd = mat.size_design_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.weight_spec ws ON ws.weight_spec_cd = mat.weight_spec_cd
     JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
     JOIN sub.lot lot ON lot.id = po.lot_id
  WHERE pos.step_cd = 'HCM' AND pos.process_order_step_status_cd = 'Running';

views.name: vw_graph_alert
views.definition:
--select * from ipc.vw_graph_alert where LotNr = '36743631' and TestCd = 'M_O_WGT B'
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_alert

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_alert;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_alert]
 AS
 SELECT a.id AS "AlertId",
    a.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    a.worst_alert AS "WorstAlert",
    a.alert_type_cd AS "AlertTypeCd",
    a.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    a.measurement_detail_id AS "MeasDetailId",
	meas.sample_date AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
	eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    a.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    a.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate",
    a.alert_status AS "AlertStatus",
    sev.alert_severity_name AS "AlertSeverityName",
    CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS "UserCd",
    a.is_active AS "IsActive"
   FROM ipc.alert a
     INNER JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON a.measurement_id = meas.id
     INNER JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     INNER JOIN mas.alert_severity sev ON a.alert_severity = sev.alert_severity
     INNER JOIN sub.lot lot ON meas.lot_id = lot.id
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on meas.user_cd = um.user_cd
  WHERE a.is_active = 1 AND a.alert_status <> 'Cancelled' AND a.alert_severity >= 0 AND a.worst_alert = 1
  
 -- AND a.plant_cd = 'BOR' 
 ---- and meas.plant_cd = 'BOR'
 -- and eq.equipment_cd = 'HCM027'
 -- and meas.sample_date > 'jul 01 2025'
 --and meas.sample_date < 'sep 03 2025'
 -- -- and  a.created_date > 'jul 01 2025'
 -- --and  a.created_date < 'sep 03 2025'

views.name: vw_graph_alert_corrective_action
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_alert_corrective_action
--select * from ipc.vw_graph_alert_corrective_action;
--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_alert_corrective_action;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_alert_corrective_action]
 AS
 SELECT aca.id AS "AlertCorrectiveActionId",
    a.id AS "AlertId",
    aca.corrective_action_id AS "CorrectiveActionId",
    ca.action_cd AS "ActionCd",
    a.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    a.alert_type_cd AS "AlertTypeCd",
    a.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    a.measurement_detail_id AS "MeasDetailId",
    a.alert_status AS "AlertStatus",
    sev.alert_severity_name AS "AlertSeverityName",
    COALESCE(meas.sample_date, a.created_date) AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    aca.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    aca.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate",
    CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN aca.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS "UserCd",
	aca.is_active as 'IsActive'
   FROM ipc.alert_corrective_action aca
     JOIN mas.corrective_action ca ON aca.corrective_action_id = ca.id
     JOIN ipc.alert a ON aca.alert_id = a.id
     LEFT JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON a.measurement_id = meas.id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.alert_severity sev ON a.alert_severity = sev.alert_severity
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on aca.user_cd = um.user_cd
  WHERE a.alert_severity >= 0;

views.name: vw_graph_dialog_measurement_with_alert_color
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_dialog_measurement_with_alert_color

 AS
 SELECT md.id AS "Id",

views.name: vw_graph_header_in_process
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_header_in_process

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_header_in_process;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_header_in_process]
 AS
  SELECT po.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    mach.equipment_cd AS "MachineCd",
    st.screen_id AS "ScreenId",
    st.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    COALESCE(ssl.specification_set_cd, 'UNKNOWN') AS "SpecificationSetCd",
    pos.actual_start_date AS "ProcessOrderderStepActualStartDate"
   FROM sub.process_order po
     JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id
     JOIN mas.material mat ON po.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
     JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
     JOIN sub.lot lot ON lot.id = po.lot_id
     JOIN ( SELECT g.screen_id,
            min(g.test_cd) AS test_cd,
            s.plant_cd
           FROM ipc.graph g
             JOIN ipc.screen s ON g.screen_id = s.id
          GROUP BY g.screen_id, s.plant_cd) st ON po.plant_cd = st.plant_cd
     LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot ssl ON ssl.lot_id = lot.id AND ssl.test_cd = st.test_cd
  WHERE pos.step_cd = 'HCM' AND pos.process_order_step_status_cd = 'Running';

views.name: vw_graph_header_offline
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_header_offline

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_header_offline;

--select * from [ipc].[vw_graph_header_offline]


--used for header in graph screen where specification set and material description is showed
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_header_offline]
 AS


 SELECT 
	lot.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    st.screen_id AS "ScreenId",
    isnull(t.test_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "TestCd",
    isnull(mach.equipment_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "MachineCd",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    ISNULL(ssl.specification_set_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "SpecificationSetCd"
	
   FROM sub.lot lot
     JOIN ipc.test t on 1 = 1   --test will be selected by joining on screen subquery (table st)
     JOIN ( SELECT g.screen_id,
            min(g.test_cd) AS test_cd
           FROM ipc.graph g
             JOIN ipc.screen s ON g.screen_id = s.id			 
          GROUP BY g.screen_id) st ON t.test_cd = st.test_cd

	LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot ssl ON ssl.lot_id = lot.id and ssl.test_cd = t.test_cd

     LEFT JOIN mas.material mat ON lot.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = lot.plant_cd

	 LEFT JOIN sub.process_order po ON lot.id = po.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id AND pos.step_cd = 'HCM'
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
WHERE 1 = 1;

views.name: vw_graph_header_offline_old
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_header_offline

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_header_offline;

--select * from [ipc].[vw_graph_header_offline]


--used for header in graph screen where specification set and material description is showed
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_header_offline_old]
 AS
 SELECT lot.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    st.screen_id AS "ScreenId",
    isnull(ssl.test_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "TestCd",
    isnull(mach.equipment_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "MachineCd",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    ISNULL(ssl.specification_set_cd,'UNKNOWN') AS "SpecificationSetCd"
	
   FROM sub.lot lot
	 LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot ssl ON ssl.lot_id = lot.id

     LEFT JOIN sub.process_order po ON lot.id = po.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id AND pos.step_cd = 'HCM'
     
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT g.screen_id,
            min(g.test_cd) AS test_cd
           FROM ipc.graph g
             JOIN ipc.screen s ON g.screen_id = s.id
          GROUP BY g.screen_id) st ON ssl.test_cd = st.test_cd

     LEFT JOIN mas.material mat ON lot.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = lot.plant_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
WHERE 1 = 1;
-- WHERE pos.step_cd = 'HCM';

views.name: vw_graph_measurement
views.definition:
-- View

/*select top 100 * from [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement]
 View: ipc.vw_graph_measurement
DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_measurement;*/
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement]
AS
SELECT meas.id AS MeasId, meas.plant_cd AS PlantCd, t.test_cd AS TestCd, meq.equipment_cd AS MeasEquipment, l.id AS LotId, l.lot_nr AS LotNr, mac.equipment_cd AS MachineNr, meas.sublot_id AS SublotId, '' AS SublotNr, loc.area, 
                  loc.location, meas.avg_value AS AvgValue, t.uom_cd AS UomCd, meas.measurement_date AS MeasurementDate, meas.lcl_actual AS Lcl, meas.range, sl.tgt, meas.ucl_actual AS Ucl,sl.lrl, sl.url, sl.lsl, sl.usl, sl.lsg, sl.usg, sl.lwl, sl.uwl, 
                  meas.measurement_status AS MeasurementStatus, sl.sample_size AS TestSampleSize, meas.shift_cd AS ShiftCd, tc.team_cd AS TeamCd, meas.sample_date AS SampleDate, meas.sample_size AS SampleCount, 
                  meas.created_date AS CreatedDate, CASE WHEN um.id IS NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE isnull(um.first_name, '') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name, '') END AS UserCd, meas.is_active AS IsActive
FROM     ipc.measurement AS meas INNER JOIN
                  ipc.test AS t ON t.test_cd = meas.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.equipment AS meq ON meq.id = meas.meas_equipment_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  ipc.specification_lot AS sl ON sl.lot_id = meas.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = meas.test_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  sub.lot AS l ON l.id = meas.lot_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.equipment AS mac ON mac.id = meas.machine_equipment_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.location AS loc ON loc.id = meas.location_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.team_calendar AS tc ON meas.team_calendar_id = tc.id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  rba.user_mes AS um ON meas.user_cd = um.user_cd

views.name: vw_graph_measurement_attribute
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_measurement_attribute

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_measurement_attribute;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement_attribute]
 AS
 SELECT meas_attr.id AS "MeasurementAttrId",
    meas_attr.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    a.attribute_cd AS "AttributeCd",
    meas_attr.attribute_id AS "AttributeId",
    meas_attr.attribute_value AS "AttributeValue",
    COALESCE(meas.sample_date, meas_attr.created_date) AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    meas_attr.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    meas_attr.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate",
    meas_attr.is_active AS "IsActive"
   FROM ipc.measurement_attribute meas_attr
     LEFT JOIN ipc.attribute a ON a.id = meas_attr.attribute_id
     LEFT JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON meas_attr.measurement_id = meas.id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot lot ON meas.lot_id = lot.id;

views.name: vw_graph_measurement_comment
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_measurement_comment
--select * from [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement_comment]
--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_measurement_comment;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement_comment]
 AS
 SELECT meas_com.id AS "MeasurementCommentId",
    meas_com.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    meas_com.comment AS "Comment",
	meas_com.comment_type AS "CommentType",
     CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN meas_com.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS "UserCd",
    COALESCE(meas.sample_date, meas_com.created_date) AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    meas_com.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    meas_com.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate",
    meas_com.is_active AS "IsActive",
    meas.plant_cd AS "PlantCd"
   FROM ipc.measurement_comment meas_com
     LEFT JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON meas_com.measurement_id = meas.id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot lot ON meas.lot_id = lot.id
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on meas_com.user_cd = um.user_cd;

views.name: vw_graph_measurement_detail
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_measurement_detail

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_measurement_detail;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement_detail]
 AS
 SELECT  meas_det.id AS "MeasurementDetailId",
    meas_det.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    meas_det.measurement_nr AS "MeasNr",
    meas_det.value AS "Value",
    meas_det.uom_cd AS "Uom",
    meas_det.raw_data_value AS "RawDataValue",
    meas_det.raw_uom_cd AS "RawUom",
	meas.sample_date AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
    --COALESCE(meas.sample_date, meas_det.created_date) AS "LinkToMeasGraphDate",
    meas_det.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    meas_det.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate",
    meas_det.is_active AS "IsActive",
    meas.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    e.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr"
   FROM ipc.measurement_detail meas_det
     LEFT JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON meas_det.measurement_id = meas.id
     JOIN mas.equipment e ON meas.machine_equipment_id = e.id	;

views.name: vw_graph_specification_lot
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_specification_lot

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_specification_lot;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_graph_specification_lot]
 AS
 SELECT sl.id AS "SpecificationLotId",
    sl.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    t.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    l.id AS "LotId",
    l.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    sl.lcl AS "Lcl",
    sl.tgt AS "Tgt",
    sl.ucl AS "Ucl",
    sl.lsl AS "Lsl",
    sl.usl AS "Usl",
    sl.lsg AS "Lsg",
    sl.usg AS "Usg",
    sl.lwl AS "Lwl",
    sl.uwl AS "Uwl",
    t.uom_cd AS "Uom",
    COALESCE(sl.sample_size, t.default_sample_size) AS "TestSampleSize",
    sl.lcl_alert_severity AS "LclAlertSeverity",
    sl.ucl_alert_severity AS "UclAlertSeverity",
    sl.lsl_alert_severity AS "LslAlertSeverity",
    sl.usl_alert_severity AS "UslAlertSeverity",
    sl.usg_alert_severity AS "UsgAlertSeverity",
    sl.lsg_alert_severity AS "LsgAlertSeverity",
    sl.uwl_alert_severity AS "UwlAlertSeverity",
    sl.lwl_alert_severity AS "LwlAlertSeverity"
   FROM ipc.specification_lot sl
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = sl.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
     JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = sl.lot_id;

views.name: vw_iot_current_measurement
views.definition:
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_iot_current_measurement]
AS

SELECT  iot.plant_cd				AS 'PlantCd',
		e.equipment_cd			AS 'EquipmentCd',
		e.equipment_class_cd	AS 'EquipmentClassCd',
		iot.measurement_date	AS 'MeasurementDateUtc',
		t.tag_cd				AS 'TagCd',
		iot.value				AS 'MeasurementValue',
		t.uom_cd				AS 'UomCd'
		
FROM  ipc.iot_current_measurement iot 
INNER JOIN mas.equipment e ON e.plant_cd = iot.plant_cd AND e.equipment_cd = iot.equipment_cd AND e.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN ipc.tag t ON t.tag_cd = iot.tag_cd AND t.is_active = 1

views.name: vw_iot_measurement
views.definition:
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_iot_measurement]
AS

SELECT  iot.plant_cd				AS 'PlantCd',
		l.lot_nr				AS 'LotNr',
		e.equipment_cd			AS 'EquipmentCd',
		e.equipment_class_cd	AS 'EquipmentClassCd',
		iot.measurement_date	AS 'MeasurementDateUtc',
		c.chart_cd				AS 'ChartCd',
		t.tag_cd				AS 'TagCd',
		iot.value				AS 'MeasurementValue',
		t.uom_cd				AS 'UomCd',
		iot.source_cd			AS 'SourceCd',
		d.date_id				AS 'DateId',
		d.full_date				AS 'FullDate',
		d.date_month			AS 'DateMonth',
		d.date_year				AS 'DateYear'

FROM  ipc.chart c 
INNER JOIN ipc.chart_tag ct ON ct.chart_id = c.id AND ct.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN ipc.tag t ON t.id = ct.tag_id AND t.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN ipc.iot_measurement iot ON iot.tag_cd = t.tag_cd
INNER JOIN rpt.dim_date d ON iot.report_date_id = d.date_id
INNER JOIN mas.equipment e ON e.plant_cd = iot.plant_cd AND e.equipment_cd = iot.equipment_cd AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON iot.lot_id = l.id

views.name: vw_iot_stopcode_data
views.definition:
/*
SELECT PlantCd,
        LotNr,
        EquipmentCd,
        EquipmentClassCd,
        MeasurementDateUtc,
        MeasurementValue,
		StasNr,
		StasCd,
		StasStopDescription

FROM  [ipc].[vw_iot_stopcode_data] m (NOLOCK)
WHERE m.EquipmentCd = 'HCM001'
AND m.MeasurementDateUtc BETWEEN 'sep 30 2025' AND 'oct 2 2025'
ORDER BY m.MeasurementDateUtc DESC
*/

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_iot_stopcode_data]
AS


SELECT  iot.plant_cd				AS 'PlantCd',
		l.lot_nr				AS 'LotNr',
		e.equipment_cd			AS 'EquipmentCd',
		e.equipment_class_cd	AS 'EquipmentClassCd',
		iot.measurement_date	AS 'MeasurementDateUtc',
		iot.value				AS 'MeasurementValue',
		iot.tag_cd				AS 'TagCd',
		sc.stas_nr				AS 'StasNr',
		sc.stas_cd				AS 'StasCd',
		sc.description			AS 'StasStopDescription',
		sc.color				AS 'Color'
FROM ipc.iot_measurement iot
INNER JOIN sts.stas_legacy_code sl ON iot.value = sl.legacy_stas_nr AND sl.plant_Cd = iot.plant_cd
INNER JOIN sts.stas_code sc ON sc.stas_nr = sl.stas_nr
INNER JOIN mas.equipment e ON e.plant_cd = iot.plant_cd AND e.equipment_cd = iot.equipment_cd AND e.is_active = 1
LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON iot.lot_id = l.id
WHERE iot.tag_cd = 'Stas Code'

views.name: vw_list_alerts
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_list_alerts
--select * from ipc.vw_list_alerts;
--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_list_alerts;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_list_alerts]
 AS
 SELECT aca.id AS "AlertCorrectiveActionId",
    a.id AS "AlertId",
    a.measurement_id AS "MeasId",
    a.measurement_detail_id AS "MeasDetailId",
    aca.corrective_action_id AS "CorrectiveActionId",
    a.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    a.alert_type_cd AS "AlertTypeCd",
    a.user_cd AS "AlertCreationUserCd",
    a.created_date AS "AlertDate",
    a.alert_status AS "AlertStatus",
    a.worst_alert AS "WorstAlert",
    sev.alert_severity_name AS "AlertSeverityName",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    ca.action_cd AS "CorrActionCd",
    aca.created_date AS "CorrActionCreatedDate",
    aca.last_edit_date AS "CorrActionLastEditDate",
    CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN aca.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS 'CorrActionUserCd',
    aca.is_active AS "CorrActionIsActive",
    eg.equipment_group_cd AS "EquipmentGroupCd",
    eq.id AS "EquipmentId",
    eg.id AS "EquipmentGroupId",
    l.lot_nr AS "LotNr"
   FROM ipc.alert a
     LEFT JOIN ipc.alert_corrective_action aca ON aca.alert_id = a.id
     LEFT JOIN mas.corrective_action ca ON aca.corrective_action_id = ca.id
     LEFT JOIN mas.alert_severity sev ON a.alert_severity = sev.alert_severity
     JOIN ipc.measurement meas ON a.measurement_id = meas.id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = meas.lot_id
     JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     JOIN mas.equipment_assignment ea ON eq.id = ea.equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment_group eg ON ea.equipment_group_id = eg.id AND eg.group_type = 'HCM_OPERATOR_GROUP'
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on aca.user_cd = um.user_cd
  WHERE a.alert_severity >= 0;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_list_measurement]
 AS
SELECT meas.id AS "MeasId",
    meas.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    t.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    meq.equipment_cd AS "MeasEquipment",
    l.id AS "LotId",
    l.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    meas.sublot_id AS "SublotId",
    '' AS "SublotNr",
    loc.area AS "Area",
    loc.location AS "Location",
    meas.avg_value AS "AvgValue",
    meas.uom_cd AS "UomCd",
    meas.measurement_date AS "MeasurementDate",
    meas.lcl_actual AS "Lcl",
    meas.range AS "Range",
    sl.tgt AS "Tgt",
    meas.ucl_actual AS "Ucl",
    sl.lsl AS "Lsl",
    sl.usl AS "Usl",
    sl.lsg AS "Lsg",
    sl.usg AS "Usg",
    sl.lwl AS "Lwl",
    sl.uwl AS "Uwl",
    meas.measurement_status AS "MeasurementStatus",
    meas.sample_size AS "SampleSize",
    meas.shift_cd AS "ShiftCd",
    tc.team_cd AS "TeamCd",
	t.test_type_cd "TestTypeCd",
	t.test_mode_cd "TestModeCd",
	t.description "TestDescription",
	t.sample_location "TestSampleLocation",
    meas.sample_date AS "SampleDate",
    meas.sample_size AS "SampleCount",
    meas.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS "UserCd",
    meas.is_active AS "IsActive",
    eg.id AS "MachEquipmentGroupId",
	eg.equipment_group_cd AS "EquipmentGroupCd"
   FROM ipc.measurement meas
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = meas.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment meq ON meq.id = meas.meas_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot sl ON sl.lot_id = meas.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = meas.test_cd
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = meas.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment_assignment ea ON eq.id = ea.equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment_group eg ON ea.equipment_group_id = eg.id AND eg.group_type = 'HCM_OPERATOR_GROUP'
     LEFT JOIN mas.location loc ON loc.id = meas.location_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.team_calendar tc ON meas.team_calendar_id = tc.id
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on meas.user_cd = um.user_cd;

views.name: vw_lookup_attribute
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_lookup_attribute

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_lookup_attribute;

--select * from ipc.vw_lookup_attribute

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_lookup_attribute]
 AS

 SELECT TOP 1000000
	a.attribute_cd AS "AttributeCd",
	a.plant_cd + ' - ' + a.attribute_cd AS "PlantAttribute",
    a.id AS "AttributeId",
    a.is_active AS "IsActive",
    a.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    a.description AS "Description",
    CASE WHEN EXISTS( SELECT 1
           FROM ipc.attribute_value av
          WHERE av.attribute_id = a.id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "HasValues"
   FROM ipc.attribute a
   WHERE a.is_active = 1
  ORDER BY a.attribute_cd;

views.name: vw_meas_detail
views.definition:
-- View

/*select top 100 * from [ipc].[vw_graph_measurement]
 View: ipc.vw_graph_measurement
DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_measurement;*/
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_meas_detail]
AS
SELECT meas.id AS MeasId, meas.plant_cd AS PlantCd, t.test_cd AS TestCd, meq.equipment_cd AS MeasEquipment, l.id AS LotId, l.lot_nr AS LotNr, mac.equipment_cd AS MachineNr, meas.sublot_id AS SublotId, '' AS SublotNr, loc.area, 
                  loc.location, meas.avg_value AS AvgValue, meas.uom_cd AS UomCd, meas.measurement_date AS MeasurementDate, meas.lcl_actual AS Lcl, meas.range, sl.tgt, meas.ucl_actual AS Ucl, sl.lsl, sl.usl, sl.lsg, sl.usg, sl.lwl, sl.uwl, 
                  meas.measurement_status AS MeasurementStatus, sl.sample_size AS TestSampleSize, meas.shift_cd AS ShiftCd, tc.team_cd AS TeamCd, meas.sample_date AS SampleDate, meas.sample_size AS SampleCount, 
                  meas.created_date AS CreatedDate, CASE WHEN um.id IS NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE isnull(um.first_name, '') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name, '') END AS UserCd, meas.is_active AS IsActive
FROM     ipc.measurement AS meas INNER JOIN
                  ipc.test AS t ON t.test_cd = meas.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.equipment AS meq ON meq.id = meas.meas_equipment_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  ipc.specification_lot AS sl ON sl.lot_id = meas.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = meas.test_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  sub.lot AS l ON l.id = meas.lot_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.equipment AS mac ON mac.id = meas.machine_equipment_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.location AS loc ON loc.id = meas.location_id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  mas.team_calendar AS tc ON meas.team_calendar_id = tc.id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  rba.user_mes AS um ON meas.user_cd = um.user_cd

views.name: vw_measurement
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_measurement

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_measurement;

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_measurement]
 AS
SELECT meas.id AS "MeasId",
    meas.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    t.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    meq.equipment_cd AS "MeasEquipment",
    l.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    eq.equipment_cd AS "MachineNr",
    '' AS "SublotNr",
    loc.area AS "Area",
    loc.location AS "Location",
    meas.avg_value AS "AvgValue",
    meas.uom_cd AS "UomCd",
    meas.measurement_date AS "MeasurementDate",
    meas.lcl_actual AS "Lcl",
    meas.range AS "Range",
    sl.tgt AS "Tgt",
    meas.ucl_actual AS "Ucl",
    sl.lsl AS "Lsl",
    sl.usl AS "Usl",
    sl.lsg AS "Lsg",
    sl.usg AS "Usg",
    sl.lwl AS "Lwl",
    sl.uwl AS "Uwl",
    meas.measurement_status AS "MeasurementStatus",
    meas.sample_size AS "SampleSize",
    meas.shift_cd AS "ShiftCd",
    tc.team_cd AS "TeamCd",
	t.test_type_cd "TestTypeCd",
	t.test_mode_cd "TestModeCd",
	t.description "TestDescription",
    meas.sample_date AS "SampleDate",
    meas.sample_size AS "SampleCount",
    meas.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS "UserCd",
    meas.is_active AS "IsActive",
    eg.id AS "MachEquipmentGroupId",
	eg.equipment_group_cd AS "EquipmentGroupCd"
   FROM ipc.measurement meas
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = meas.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment meq ON meq.id = meas.meas_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot sl ON sl.lot_id = meas.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = meas.test_cd
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = meas.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment eq ON eq.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment_assignment ea ON eq.id = ea.equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment_group eg ON ea.equipment_group_id = eg.id AND eg.group_type = 'HCM_OPERATOR_GROUP'
     LEFT JOIN mas.location loc ON loc.id = meas.location_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.team_calendar tc ON meas.team_calendar_id = tc.id
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on meas.user_cd = um.user_cd;

views.name: vw_rpt_cdm_measurements_bydate
views.definition:
--ipc.csp_generate_measurement_report 'aug 1 2025','aug 2 2025'


CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_rpt_cdm_measurements_bydate]
AS
SELECT m.id             AS 'Id',
        m.plant_cd      AS 'PlantCd',
        mach.equipment_cd       AS 'EquipmentCd',
        mach.equipment_nr       AS 'EquipmentNr',
        l.lot_nr                AS 'LotNr',
        mat.material_cd            AS 'MaterialCd',
        mat.size_design_cd      AS 'SizeDesignCd',
        mat.polymer_cd          AS 'PolymerCd',
        mat.visual_quality_level_cd AS 'VisualQualityLevelCd',
        mat.weight_spec_cd          AS 'WeightSpecCd',
        mat.lod_cd                  AS 'LodCd',
        m.test_cd           AS 'TestCd',
        t.test_type_cd      AS 'TestTypeCd',
        t.description       AS 'TestDescription',
        m.sample_date       AS 'SampleDate',
        m.measurement_date  AS 'MeasurementDate',
        m.uom_cd            AS 'UomCd',
        m.avg_value         AS 'AvgValue',
        m.lcl_actual         AS 'Lcl',
        m.ucl_actual         AS 'Ucl',
        m.range              AS 'Range',
        m.user_cd           AS 'UserCd',


        mr.dt_year          AS 'DateYear',
        mr.dt_month         AS 'DateMonth',
        mr.dt_day           AS 'DateDay',
        mr.dt_week          AS 'DateWeek',
        m.measurement_status    AS 'Status'
FROM ipc.measurement m
INNER JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = m.test_cd
INNER JOIN ipc.measurement_report mr ON m.id=mr.id
INNER JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = m.machine_equipment_id
INNER JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = m.lot_id
INNER JOIN mas.material mat ON l.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = l.plant_cd

views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_sample_size_from_machine

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_sample_size_from_machine;vw_sample_size_from_machine

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_sample_size_from_machine]
 AS

SELECT cast(ea.attribute_value as int) AS "SampleSize",
    e.equipment_cd AS "EquipmentCd",
    e.plant_cd AS "PlantCd"
   FROM mas.equipment e
   join mas.equipment_attribute ea on ea.equipment_id = e.id

views.name: vw_specification_lot
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_specification_lot
--select top 100  * from ipc.specification_lot
--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_specification_lot;vw_specification_lot
--select top 100 * from ipc.vw_specification_lot
--where lotnr = '54293751 '

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_specification_lot]
 AS

 SELECT sl.id AS 'SpecificationLotId',
	sl.specification_set_cd AS 'SpecificationSetCd',
    sl.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    t.test_cd AS 'TestCd',
    l.id AS 'LotId',
    l.lot_nr AS 'LotNr',
	sl.tgt AS 'Tgt',
    round(ipc.fn_spec_lcl_calc(sl.cl_mean,sl.cl_lsigma, COALESCE(sl.sample_size, t.default_sample_size)),t.precision)  AS 'Lcl_default',
    round(ipc.fn_spec_ucl_calc(sl.cl_mean,sl.cl_usigma, COALESCE(sl.sample_size, t.default_sample_size)),t.precision)  AS 'Ucl_default',
    sl.lsl AS 'Lsl',
    sl.usl AS 'Usl',
    sl.lsg AS 'Lsg',
    sl.usg AS 'Usg',
	sl.lwl AS 'Lwl',
    sl.uwl AS Uwl,
	sl.lrl AS 'Lrl',
    sl.url AS Url,
    sl.cl_mean AS 'ClMean',
    sl.cl_lsigma AS 'ClLSigma',
    sl.cl_usigma AS 'ClUSigma',
    t.uom_cd AS 'Uom',
    COALESCE(sl.sample_size, t.default_sample_size) AS 'TestSampleSize',
    sl.lcl_alert_severity AS 'LclAlertSeverity',
    sl.ucl_alert_severity AS 'UclAlertSeverity',
    sl.lsl_alert_severity AS 'LslAlertSeverity',
    sl.usl_alert_severity AS 'UslAlertSeverity',
    sl.usg_alert_severity AS 'UsgAlertSeverity',
    sl.lsg_alert_severity AS 'LsgAlertSeverity',
    sl.uwl_alert_severity AS 'UwlAlertSeverity',
    sl.lwl_alert_severity AS 'LwlAlertSeverity',
	sl.created_date AS 'CreatedDate',
	sl.last_edit_date AS 'LastEditDate',
	sl.specification_set_condition_id as 'SpecificationConditionId',
	sl.last_edit_user_cd as 'LastEditUser'
   FROM ipc.specification_lot sl
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = sl.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
     JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = sl.lot_id;

views.name: vw_specification_set_condition_expanded
views.definition:
--select * from ipc.vw_specification_set_condition_expanded

-- View: ipc.vw_specification_set_condition_expanded

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_specification_set_condition

CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_specification_set_condition_expanded]
 AS

SELECT c.id AS 'ConditionId',
    c.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    t.test_cd AS 'TestCd',
    c.test_cd AS 'SpecificationSetTestCd',
    c.priority AS 'Priority',
    c.specification_set_cd AS 'SpecificationSetCd',
    c.test_mode_cd AS 'TestMode',
    c.test_type_cd AS 'TestType',
    c.customer_cd AS 'CustomerCd',
	c.customer_cd_st AS 'CustomerCdSt',
    c.customer_product_cd AS 'CustomerProductCd',
    c.material_id AS 'MaterialId',
    c.product_family_cd AS 'ProductFamilyCd',
	c.product_type_cd as 'ProductTypeCd',
    c.size_design_cd AS 'SizeDesignCd',
    c.pin_design_cd AS 'PinDesignCd',
    c.body_color_cd AS 'BodyColorCd',
    c.cap_color_cd AS 'CapColorCd',
    c.polymer_cd AS 'PolymerCd',
    c.lod_cd AS 'LodCd',
    c.pin_treatment_cd AS 'PinTreatmentCd',
    c.surface_treatment_cd AS 'SurfaceTreatmentCd',
    c.weight_spec_cd AS 'WeightSpecCd',
    c.manufacturing_type_cd AS 'ManufacturingTypeCd',
    c.is_printed AS 'IsPrinted',
    c.equipment_model AS 'EquipmentModel',
    c.material_group_cd AS 'MaterialGroupCd',
    c.psn_cd AS 'PsnCd',
    c.is_active AS 'ConditionIsActive',
    c.created_date AS 'ConditionCreatedDate',
    c.last_edit_date AS 'ConditionLastEditDate',
	s.id AS 'SpecSetId', 
    s.tgt AS 'Tgt',
    s.lsl AS 'Lsl',
    s.usl AS 'Usl',
    s.lsg AS 'Lsg',
    s.usg AS 'Usg',
    s.lwl AS 'Lwl',
    s.uwl AS 'Uwl',
    s.lrl AS 'Lrl',
    s.url AS 'Url',
    s.cl_mean AS 'ClMean',
    s.cl_lsigma AS 'ClLsigma',
    s.cl_usigma AS 'ClUsigma',
    s.sample_size_default AS 'SampleSizeDefault',
    null AS 'LclForSampleSizeDefault',
    null AS 'UclForSampleSizeDefault',
    s.lsl_alert_severity AS 'LslAlertSeverity',
    s.usl_alert_severity AS 'UslAlertSeverity',
    s.lsg_alert_severity AS 'LsgAlertSeverity',
    s.usg_alert_severity AS 'UsgAlertSeverity',
    s.lwl_alert_severity AS 'LwlAlertSeverity',
    s.uwl_alert_severity AS 'UwlAlertSeverity',
    s.lcl_alert_severity AS 'LclAlertSeverity',
    s.ucl_alert_severity AS 'UclAlertSeverity',
    s.is_active AS 'SetIsActive',
    s.created_date AS 'SetCreatedDate',
    s.last_edit_date AS 'SetLastEditDate',
    t.uom_cd AS 'UomCd',
	t.is_active 'TestIsActive',
	s.is_active 'SpecSetIsActive'
   FROM ipc.specification_set_condition c
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = c.test_cd
     JOIN ipc.specification_set_limit s ON c.plant_cd = s.plant_cd AND c.specification_set_cd = s.specification_set_cd AND s.test_cd = t.test_cd  ---JOIN instead of left join, will only return records with actual specification limit linked
  WHERE c.test_cd IS NOT NULL
UNION
 SELECT c.id AS 'ConditionId',
    c.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    t.test_cd AS 'TestCd',
    c.test_cd AS 'SpecificationSetTestCd',
    c.priority AS 'Priority',
    c.specification_set_cd AS 'SpecificationSetCd',
    c.test_mode_cd AS 'TestMode',
    c.test_type_cd AS 'TestType',
    c.customer_cd AS 'CustomerCd',
	c.customer_cd_st AS 'CustomerCdSt',
    c.customer_product_cd AS 'CustomerProductCd',
    c.material_id AS 'MaterialId',
    c.product_family_cd AS 'ProductFamilyCd',
	c.product_type_cd as 'ProductTypeCd',
    c.size_design_cd AS 'SizeDesignCd',
    c.pin_design_cd AS 'PinDesignCd',
    c.body_color_cd AS 'BodyColorCd',
    c.cap_color_cd AS 'CapColorCd',
    c.polymer_cd AS 'PolymerCd',
    c.lod_cd AS 'LodCd',
    c.pin_treatment_cd AS 'PinTreatmentCd',
    c.surface_treatment_cd AS 'SurfaceTreatmentCd',
    c.weight_spec_cd AS 'WeightSpecCd',
    c.manufacturing_type_cd AS 'ManufacturingTypeCd',
    c.is_printed AS 'IsPrinted',
    c.equipment_model AS 'EquipmentModel',
    c.material_group_cd AS 'MaterialGroupCd',
    c.psn_cd AS 'PsnCd',
    c.is_active AS 'ConditionIsActive',
    c.created_date AS 'ConditionCreatedDate',
    c.last_edit_date AS 'ConditionLastEditDate',
	s.id AS 'SpecSetId', 
    s.tgt AS 'Tgt',
    s.lsl AS 'Lsl',
    s.usl AS 'Usl',
    s.lsg AS 'Lsg',
    s.usg AS 'Usg',
    s.lwl AS 'Lwl',
    s.uwl AS 'Uwl',
    s.lrl AS 'Lrl',
    s.url AS 'Url',
    s.cl_mean AS 'ClMean',

views.name: vw_specification_set_limit
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_specification_set_limit

/*
select top 100000 * from ipc.[vw_specification_set_limit]

*/
CREATE VIEW [ipc].[vw_specification_set_limit]
 AS

SELECT ssl.[plant_cd] 'PlantCd'
      ,ssl.[test_cd] 'TestCd'
      ,ssl.[specification_set_cd] 'SpecificationSetCd'
	  ,ss.description 'SpecificationSetDescr'
      ,ssl.[tgt]
      ,ssl.[lsl]
      ,ssl.[usl]
      ,ssl.[lsg]
      ,ssl.[usg]
      ,ssl.[lwl]
      ,ssl.[uwl]
      ,ssl.[lrl]
      ,ssl.[url]
	  ,round(ipc.fn_spec_lcl_calc(ssl.cl_mean,ssl.cl_lsigma,ssl.[sample_size_default]),t.precision)  'LclDefault'
	  ,round(ipc.fn_spec_ucl_calc(ssl.cl_mean,ssl.cl_usigma,ssl.[sample_size_default]),t.precision)  'UclDefault'
      ,ssl.[cl_mean] 'ClMean'
      ,ssl.[cl_lsigma] 'ClLSigma'
      ,ssl.[cl_usigma] 'ClUSigma'
      ,ssl.[sample_size_default] 'SampleSizeDefault'
      ,s_lsl.alert_severity_name 'LslSeverity'
      ,s_usl.alert_severity_name 'UslSeverity'
      ,s_lsg.alert_severity_name 'LsgSeverity'
      ,s_usg.alert_severity_name 'UsgSeverity'
      ,s_lwl.alert_severity_name 'LwlSeverity'
      ,s_uwl.alert_severity_name 'UwlSeverity'
      ,s_lcl.alert_severity_name 'LclSeverity'
      ,s_ucl.alert_severity_name 'UclSeverity'
      ,ssl.[created_date] 'CreatedDate'
      ,ssl.[last_edit_date] 'LastEditDate'
      ,ssl.[last_edit_user_cd] 'LastEditUser'
  FROM [ipc].[specification_set_limit] ssl
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = ssl.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
	 JOIN [ipc].[specification_set] ss on ssl.specification_set_cd = ss.specification_set_cd
	 JOIN mas.alert_severity s_lsl  on ssl.[lsl_alert_severity] = s_lsl.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_usl  on  ssl.[usl_alert_severity] = s_usl.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_lsg  on ssl.[lsg_alert_severity] = s_lsg.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_usg  on ssl.[usg_alert_severity] = s_usg.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_lwl  on ssl.[lwl_alert_severity] = s_lwl.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_uwl  on ssl.[uwl_alert_severity] = s_uwl.alert_severity
     JOIN mas.alert_severity s_lcl  on ssl.[lcl_alert_severity] = s_lcl.alert_severity 
	 JOIN mas.alert_severity s_ucl  on ssl.ucl_alert_severity = s_ucl.alert_severity
WHERE ssl.is_active = 1
and ss.is_active = 1
and t.is_active = 1

storedProcedures.name: csp_capsize_insert_data
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
 ipc.[csp_capsize_insert_data] 'BOR', 5, 1,'00000002003','.001',18,'2025-09-08 14:00:11.000', 'LENC01', '8.167696:8.223299:8.230226:8.130703:8.227024', 'mm', '36744591',0,'Capsize'

 	SELECT top 100 application, application_process, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''),plant_cd, user_cd, message, action, duration,*
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_capsize_insert_data'
	ORDER BY created_date desc
 */

/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_capsize_insert_data] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_capsize_insert_data] TO [app_datawriters];
*/



CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_capsize_insert_data]
    @plant_cd nvarchar(50) ,
	@sample_size int,
	@capsize_unit int,
	@cassette_id nvarchar(50),
	@sublot_nr nvarchar(50),
	@hcm_nr int,
	@sample_datetime datetimeoffset,--is already in UTC delivered by Capsize
	@test_cd nvarchar(50),
	@meas varchar(5000),
	@uom_cd nvarchar(50),
	@lot_nr nvarchar(50),
	@original_key int,
	@user_cd nvarchar(100)
   
AS

BEGIN

		-- TEMP
	SET @user_cd = 'Capsize ' + convert(varchar(5), @capsize_unit)

	DECLARE @log_action nvarchar(500)
	DECLARE @log_starttime datetime

	DECLARE @measid		UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @result		NVARCHAR(100)

	DECLARE @lot_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @meas_equipm_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @mach_equipm_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @location_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @sample_datetime_utc datetimeoffset
	DECLARE @meas_datetime_utc datetimeoffset
	DECLARE @shift_cd nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @lwl float
	DECLARE @uwl float
	DECLARE @lsl float
	DECLARE @usl float
	DECLARE @lsg float
	DECLARE @usg float
	DECLARE @lrl float
	DECLARE @url float
	DECLARE @lwl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @uwl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @lsl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @usl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @lsg_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @usg_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @lcl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @ucl_alert_severity int
	DECLARE @cl_mean float
	DECLARE @cl_usigma float
	DECLARE @cl_lsigma float
	DECLARE @measurement_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @OutputTbl TABLE (Id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER)
	DECLARE @avg_value float
	DECLARE @lcl_actual float
	DECLARE @ucl_actual float
	DECLARE @range float
	DECLARE @std_deviation float
	DECLARE @precision int
	DECLARE @final_value float
	DECLARE @test_uom_cd nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @uom_conversion_factor float
	DECLARE @worst_alert_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @cassette_attribute_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @sublot_attribute_id uniqueidentifier

	DECLARE  @measurement TABLE (id uniqueidentifier NOT NULL DEFAULT NEWSEQUENTIALID(),	[plant_cd] [nvarchar](50),	[meas_equipment_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,	[machine_equipment_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,
	[lot_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,	[sublot_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,	[test_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[sample_date] [datetimeoffset](7) ,
	[sample_size] [int] ,	[uom_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[location_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,	[description] [nvarchar](255) ,
	[description2] [nvarchar](255) ,	[avg_value] [float] ,	[lcl_actual] [float] ,	[ucl_actual] [float] ,	[range] [float] ,
	[user_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[original_key] [bigint] ,	[measurement_date] [datetimeoffset](7) ,	[measurement_status] [nvarchar](50) ,
	[shift_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[team_calendar_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,		[std_deviation] [float] NULL , is_active bit ,[created_date]  [datetimeoffset](7)  ,[last_edit_date]  [datetimeoffset](7)  ,[last_edit_user_cd] nvarchar(50))
	
	DECLARE @measurement_detail TABLE (id uniqueidentifier NOT NULL DEFAULT NEWSEQUENTIALID(),[measurement_id] uniqueidentifier,  [measurement_nr] int identity,	[value] [float] ,[uom_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,
	[raw_data_value] [float] ,	[raw_uom_cd] [nvarchar](50), [measurement_detail_status] nvarchar(50), is_active bit ,[created_date]  [datetimeoffset](7)  ,[last_edit_date]  [datetimeoffset](7)  ,[last_edit_user_cd] nvarchar(50))

	DECLARE @alert TABLE (	[id] [uniqueidentifier] NOT NULL DEFAULT NEWSEQUENTIALID(),
	[plant_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[alert_type_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,	[measurement_id] [uniqueidentifier],	[measurement_detail_id] [uniqueidentifier] ,
	[user_cd] [nvarchar](50) ,		[alert_severity] [int] ,	[alert_status] [nvarchar](50),	[worst_alert] [bit] ,	[is_active] [bit] ,	[created_date] [datetimeoffset](7) ,
	[last_edit_date] [datetimeoffset](7) ,	[last_edit_user_cd] [nvarchar](50))

	/*************************************************************************
	SET INITIAL DATA
	*************************************************************************/
	SET @result = 'OK'
	SET @log_starttime = getdate()
	SET @log_action = [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Plant', @plant_cd) 
					+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Hcm', @hcm_nr)
					+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Test', @test_cd)
					+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Cassette', @cassette_id)
					+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Sublot', @sublot_nr)
					+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Sample Date', @sample_datetime)
		
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_capsize_insert_data','start',@plant_cd, @user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH

	/*************************************************************************
	MEASUREMENT DATA
	*************************************************************************/
	--GET lot id
	SELECT @lot_id = id FROM sub.lot (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and lot_nr = @lot_nr
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'ERROR: No Lot Found'
		SET @log_action = @log_action +  [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Lot Nr', @lot_nr)
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END

	--GET meas equipm
	SELECT @meas_equipm_id = id FROM mas.equipment (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and equipment_class_cd = 'CAPSIZE' and equipment_nr = @capsize_unit
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'ERROR:No Meas Equipment Found'
		SET @log_action = @log_action +  [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Capsize Unit', @capsize_unit)
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END

	--GET machine equipm
	SELECT @mach_equipm_id = id FROM mas.equipment (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and equipment_class_cd = 'HCM' and equipment_nr = @hcm_nr
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'ERROR: No Machine (HCM) Found'
		SET @log_action = @log_action +  [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'HCM Nr', @hcm_nr)
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END

	--GET location
	--specific Borsor location
	SELECT @location_id = id FROM mas.location (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and area = 'Borsor' and location = 'Borsor' + right('00'+convert(varchar,@hcm_nr),3)
	If @location_id is null
	BEGIN
		SELECT @location_id = id FROM mas.location (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and area = 'Borsor' and location = 'borsor'
	END
	

	----GET testdata needed
	SELECT @precision = precision, @test_uom_cd = uom_cd FROM ipc.test (NOLOCK) WHERE test_cd = @test_cd 
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'ERROR: Test not Found'
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END
	
	--GET Lot Specification
	SELECT @lwl = lwl, @lsl = lsl, 
	@uwl = uwl, @usl = usl , 
	@lsg = lsg, @usg = usg, 
	@lrl = lrl, @url = url,
	@cl_mean = cl_mean, @cl_lsigma = cl_lsigma,  @cl_usigma = cl_usigma	,
	@lwl_alert_severity = lwl_alert_severity, @lsl_alert_severity = lsl_alert_severity,
	@uwl_alert_severity = uwl_alert_severity, @usl_alert_severity = usl_alert_severity,
	@lsg_alert_severity = lsg_alert_severity, @usg_alert_severity = usg_alert_severity,
	@lcl_alert_severity = lcl_alert_severity, @ucl_alert_severity = ucl_alert_severity
	FROM ipc.specification_lot (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and test_cd = @test_cd and lot_id = @lot_id
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'WARNING: No Lot specification found'
	END


	--Calculate lcl, ucl
	SET @lcl_actual = round(@cl_mean - (3* @cl_lsigma/SQRT(@sample_size)),@precision)
	SET @ucl_actual = round(@cl_mean + (3* @cl_usigma/SQRT(@sample_size)),@precision)

	--GET Shift
	SET @sample_datetime_utc = @sample_datetime
	SET @meas_datetime_utc = @sample_datetime
	SELECT @shift_cd = mas.[fn_shift_get]( @plant_cd, @sample_datetime)
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @result = 'WARNING: Shift not found'
	END

	-- attribute
	SELECT @cassette_attribute_id = id FROM ipc.attribute (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND attribute_cd = 'Cassette' AND is_active = 1

	-- Sublot
	SELECT @sublot_attribute_id = id FROM ipc.attribute (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND attribute_cd = 'Sublot' AND is_active = 1

	--INSERT MEASUREMENT TEMP TABLE
	INSERT INTO @measurement ([plant_cd] ,	[meas_equipment_id]  ,	[machine_equipment_id] ,location_id, 
	[lot_id]  ,	[sublot_id]  ,	[test_cd]  ,	[sample_date]  ,
	[sample_size] ,	[uom_cd]  ,	[user_cd]  ,	[original_key]  ,	[measurement_date]  ,	[measurement_status]  ,
	[lcl_actual], [ucl_actual],
	[shift_cd]  ,	[team_calendar_id], is_active  ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	VALUES (@plant_cd, @meas_equipm_id, @mach_equipm_id, @location_id, @lot_id, null, @test_cd, @sample_datetime_utc, @sample_size, @test_uom_cd, 
	@user_cd, @original_key, @sample_datetime_utc, 'Active',@lcl_actual, @ucl_actual, @shift_cd, null,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd)

	
	SELECT @measurement_id = id FROM @measurement


	--/*************************************************************************
	--MEASUREMENT DETAIL DATA 
	--*************************************************************************/
	INSERT INTO @measurement_detail  ([measurement_id],	[raw_data_value] ,	[raw_uom_cd] ,[measurement_detail_status],  is_active  ,[created_date] ,[last_edit_date]  ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	SELECT @measurement_id, value, @uom_cd,'Active',1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd 
	FROM STRING_SPLIT(@meas,':')

	

	--conversion
	SET @uom_conversion_factor = 1
	SELECT @uom_conversion_factor = mas.fn_uom_get_conversion_factor( @uom_cd,@test_uom_cd)
		
	UPDATE @measurement_detail
	SET value = ROUND(raw_data_value*@uom_conversion_factor,@precision),
	uom_cd = @test_uom_cd


	---------------------ELE IN TEST: set status of measurement_detail for values that are out of the reasonable limits
	DECLARE @alert_severity_reasonable int
	SELECT @alert_severity_reasonable = alert_severity FROM mas.alert_severity (NOLOCK) WHERE alert_severity_name = 'LOW' and is_active = 1


	IF @url is not null
	BEGIN
		--UPDATE @measurement_detail      
		--SET measurement_detail_status = '>URL'
		--WHERE value > @url

		INSERT INTO @alert (	[plant_cd]  ,	[alert_type_cd] ,	[measurement_id] ,	[measurement_detail_id]  ,
		[user_cd]  ,		[alert_severity]  ,	[alert_status] ,	[worst_alert]  ,	[is_active] ,	[created_date]  ,
		[last_edit_date] ,	[last_edit_user_cd] )
		SELECT @plant_cd,  '>URL' ,@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @alert_severity_reasonable,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
		FROM @measurement_detail 
		WHERE value > @url   --url alert

		IF @@ROWCOUNT > 0
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_capsize_insert_data' ,'viol url', @plant_cd,@user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH
	END


	IF @lrl is not null
	BEGIN
		--UPDATE @measurement_detail    
		--SET measurement_detail_status = '<LRL'
		--WHERE value < @lrl

		INSERT INTO @alert (	[plant_cd]  ,	[alert_type_cd] ,	[measurement_id] ,	[measurement_detail_id]  ,
		[user_cd]  ,		[alert_severity]  ,	[alert_status] ,	[worst_alert]  ,	[is_active] ,	[created_date]  ,
		[last_edit_date] ,	[last_edit_user_cd] )
		SELECT @plant_cd,  '<LRL',@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @alert_severity_reasonable,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
		FROM @measurement_detail WHERE value < @lrl   --lrl alert

		IF @@ROWCOUNT > 0
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_capsize_insert_data', 'viol lrl', @plant_cd,@user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH

	END
	
	IF (SELECT count(*) FROM @measurement_detail WHERE measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK') )= 0
	BEGIN
		UPDATE @measurement
		SET measurement_status = 'Cancelled'

		
		IF @@ROWCOUNT > 0
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_capsize_insert_data', 'viol removed all',@plant_cd, @user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH
	END
	-----------END TEST

	--Calculate avg, range, std dev, only take those that are OK 
	SELECT @avg_value = ROUND(AVG(value),@precision) FROM @measurement_detail WHERE measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK') 
	SELECT @range = ROUND(max(value) -  min(value),@precision) FROM @measurement_detail WHERE measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK') 
	SELECT @std_deviation = ROUND(STDEV(value),@precision) FROM @measurement_detail WHERE measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK') 

	UPDATE @measurement
	SET avg_value = @avg_value, range = @range, std_deviation = @std_deviation

	--/*************************************************************************
	--ALERT DATA
	--*************************************************************************/
	--on individual
	INSERT INTO @alert (	[plant_cd]  ,	[alert_type_cd] ,	[measurement_id] ,	[measurement_detail_id]  ,
	[user_cd]  ,		[alert_severity]  ,	[alert_status] ,	[worst_alert]  ,	[is_active] ,	[created_date]  ,
	[last_edit_date] ,	[last_edit_user_cd] )
	
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '<LWL',@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @lwl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement_detail WHERE value < @lwl and value >= @lsl  and measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK')  --lwl alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '<LSL',@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @lsl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement_detail WHERE value < @lsl	and measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK')				   --lsl alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '>UWL',@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @uwl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement_detail WHERE value > @uwl and value <= @usl and measurement_detail_status = 'OK'  --uwl alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '>USL',@measurement_id, id, @user_cd, @usl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement_detail WHERE value > @usl	and measurement_detail_status in ('Active', 'OK')				   --usl alert


	--on avg
	INSERT INTO @alert (	[plant_cd]  ,	[alert_type_cd] ,	[measurement_id] ,	[measurement_detail_id]  ,
	[user_cd]  ,		[alert_severity]  ,	[alert_status] ,	[worst_alert]  ,	[is_active] ,	[created_date]  ,
	[last_edit_date] ,	[last_edit_user_cd] )
	
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '<LSG',@measurement_id, null, @user_cd, @lsg_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement WHERE avg_value < @lsg  --lsg alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '>USG',@measurement_id, null, @user_cd, @usg_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement WHERE avg_value > @usg   --usg alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '<LCL',@measurement_id, null, @user_cd, @lcl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement WHERE avg_value < @lcl_actual  --lcl alert
	UNION
	SELECT @plant_cd,  '>UCL',@measurement_id, null, @user_cd, @ucl_alert_severity,'Active',0,1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), @user_cd
	FROM @measurement WHERE avg_value > @ucl_actual   --ucl alert


	 --worst alert
	SELECT top 1 @worst_alert_id = id 
	FROM @alert
	ORDER BY alert_severity DESC, id ASC

	UPDATE @alert
	SET worst_alert = 1
	WHERE id = @worst_alert_id

	--/*************************************************************************
	--INSERTS
	--*************************************************************************/
	--Final Insert into meas
	INSERT INTO [ipc].[measurement]
           ([id]           ,[plant_cd]           ,[meas_equipment_id]           ,[machine_equipment_id]           ,[lot_id]           ,[sublot_id]
           ,[test_cd]           ,[sample_date]           ,[sample_size]           ,[uom_cd]           ,[location_id]           ,[description]
           ,[description2]           ,[avg_value]           ,[lcl_actual]           ,[ucl_actual]           ,[range]           ,[user_cd]
           ,[original_key]           ,[measurement_date]           ,[measurement_status]           ,[shift_cd]           ,[team_calendar_id]
           ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd]
           ,[std_deviation])

	SELECT  
	id  ,	[plant_cd] ,	[meas_equipment_id]  ,	[machine_equipment_id]  ,	[lot_id]  ,	[sublot_id]  ,	
	[test_cd]  ,	[sample_date]  ,	[sample_size]  ,	[uom_cd]  ,	[location_id]  ,	[description]  ,
	[description2]  ,	[avg_value]  ,	[lcl_actual]  ,	[ucl_actual]  ,	[range]  ,	[user_cd]  ,	
	[original_key] ,	[measurement_date]  ,	[measurement_status]  ,	[shift_cd]  ,	[team_calendar_id]  ,	
	is_active  ,[created_date]    ,[last_edit_date]    ,[last_edit_user_cd],
	[std_deviation]   
	FROM @measurement
	
	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN 
		SET @result = 'ERROR: Measurement insert failed'
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END
	
	--Final Insert into  meas_attribute (Cassette)
	IF @cassette_attribute_id is not null
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO [ipc].[measurement_attribute]
			   ([measurement_id]           ,[attribute_id]           ,[attribute_value]           ,[user_cd]
			   ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
		SELECT @measurement_id, @cassette_attribute_id,@cassette_id,@user_cd,  1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(),@user_cd 
	END
	
	--Final Insert into  meas_attribute (Sublot)
	IF @sublot_attribute_id is not null
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO [ipc].[measurement_attribute]
			   ([measurement_id]           ,[attribute_id]           ,[attribute_value]           ,[user_cd]
			   ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
		SELECT @measurement_id, @sublot_attribute_id,@sublot_nr,@user_cd,  1, GETUTCDATE(), GETUTCDATE(),@user_cd 
	END

	--Final Insert into meas_detail
	INSERT INTO [ipc].[measurement_detail]
           ([id]           ,[measurement_id]           ,[measurement_nr]           ,[value]           ,[uom_cd]
           ,[raw_data_value]           ,[raw_uom_cd], [measurement_detail_status]
           ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	SELECT id ,[measurement_id] ,  [measurement_nr] ,	[value]  ,[uom_cd]  ,
	[raw_data_value]  ,	[raw_uom_cd] , [measurement_detail_status] ,is_active  ,[created_date]    ,[last_edit_date]    ,[last_edit_user_cd] 
	FROM @measurement_detail

	IF @@rowcount = 0
	BEGIN 
		SET @result = 'ERROR: Measurement_detail insert failed'
		GOTO ENDOFPROC;
	END

	IF (SELECT count(*) FROM @alert) > 0
	BEGIN
		--Final Insert into alert
		INSERT INTO [ipc].[alert]
			   ([id]           ,[plant_cd]           ,[alert_type_cd]           ,[measurement_id]           ,[measurement_detail_id]
			   ,[user_cd]           ,[original_key]           ,[alert_severity]           ,[alert_status]           ,[worst_alert]
			   ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])

		SELECT	[id] ,	[plant_cd]  ,	[alert_type_cd] ,	[measurement_id],	[measurement_detail_id]  ,
		[user_cd]  ,	null,	[alert_severity]  ,	[alert_status],	[worst_alert]  ,	
		[is_active] ,	[created_date]  ,	[last_edit_date]  ,	[last_edit_user_cd] 
		FROM @alert

		IF @@rowcount = 0 
		BEGIN 
			SET @result = 'ERROR: Measurement_alert insert failed'
			GOTO ENDOFPROC;
		END
	END
	
	--select * from @measurement_detail
	
	
	--SELECT * FROM ipc.measurement WHERE id = @measurement_id
	--SELECT * FROM ipc.measurement_detail WHERE measurement_id = @measurement_id




	--/*************************************************************************
	--RETURN THE RESULT
	--*************************************************************************/
	ENDOFPROC:

	SELECT @measid= NEWID()
		

	SELECT @measid			AS 'MeasId',
		   @result			AS 'Message'


	--/*************************************************************************
	--LOGGING
	--*************************************************************************/
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_capsize_insert_data','end', @plant_cd,@user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH

/*
	SELECT top 100 application, application_process, application_process_part, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), plant_cd, user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_capsize_insert_data'
	--and action like 'Plant: BOR; Hcm: 4; Test: A_I_LEN Closed;%'
	ORDER BY created_date desc


	SELECT top 100 application, application_process,application_process_part, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), plant_cd, user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_capsize_insert_data' and
	application_process_part like 'viol%'
	ORDER BY created_date desc
*/

END

storedProcedures.name: csp_data_entry_get_location
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
DECLARE @location_id uniqueidentifier 
EXEC [ipc].[csp_data_entry_get_location] 'BOR', 'WGTB01', null, null, null, '123', ''--, @location_id OUTPUT
SELECT @location_id
 */

/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_data_entry_get_location] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_data_entry_get_location] TO [app_datawriters];
*/



CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_data_entry_get_location]
    @plant_cd nvarchar(50) ,
	@test_cd nvarchar(50),
	@meas_equipment_id uniqueidentifier,				-- id of the measurement device
	@workstation_equipment_cd NVARCHAR(50),				-- equipment code of the workstation (computer)
	@machine_equipment_cd NVARCHAR(50),					-- machine (HCM/PCM...) code
	@lot_nr nvarchar(50),
	@user_cd nvarchar(100)--,
	--@location_id uniqueidentifier OUTPUT
   
AS

BEGIN
	


	DECLARE @log_action nvarchar(500)
	DECLARE @log_starttime datetime


	DECLARE @test_mode_cd nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @test_type_cd nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @test_sample_location nvarchar(50)
	

	DECLARE @plant_unknown_location_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @meas_equipment_location_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @workstation_equipment_location_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @machine_equipment_location_id uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @machine_equipment_nr INT
    
	DECLARE @workstation_equipment_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @machine_equipment_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
		
	SELECT @workstation_equipment_id = e.id
	FROM mas.equipment e
	WHERE e.plant_cd = @plant_cd
	AND e.equipment_cd = @workstation_equipment_cd

	SELECT @machine_equipment_id = e.id
	FROM mas.equipment e
	WHERE e.plant_cd = @plant_cd
	AND e.equipment_cd = @machine_equipment_cd

	--get unknown location, this will be used when no location is found
	SELECT @plant_unknown_location_id = id 
	FROM mas.location (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and area = 'Unknown' and location = 'Unknown'

	IF @plant_unknown_location_id is null
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO [mas].[location]  ( [plant_cd],[area]   ,[location] ,[is_active]  ,[created_date],[last_edit_date],[last_edit_user_cd])
		VALUES(@plant_cd, 'Unknown', 'Unknown',1, getutcdate(), getutcdate(),'system')       
		
		SELECT @plant_unknown_location_id = id 
		FROM mas.location (NOLOCK)

storedProcedures.name: csp_generate_measurement_report
storedProcedures.definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_generate_measurement_report]
    @StartDate DATETIMEOFFSET,
    @EndDate DATETIMEOFFSET
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
  
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;
        
        -- Delete existing records for the date range to avoid duplicates
        DELETE FROM ipc.measurement_report 
        WHERE id IN (
            SELECT mr.id 
            FROM ipc.measurement_report mr
            INNER JOIN ipc.measurement m ON mr.id = m.id
            WHERE m.sample_date >= @StartDate AND m.sample_date <= @EndDate
        );
        
        -- Insert new records for the specified date range
        INSERT INTO ipc.measurement_report (
            id,
            dt_year,
            dt_month,
            dt_day,
            dt_week,
            dt_quarter,
            dt_shift,
            dt_hour
        )
        SELECT 
            m.id,
            -- Year: YYYY
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyy') AS dt_year,
            
            -- Month: YYYYMM
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyyMM') AS dt_month,
            
            -- Day: YYYYMMDD
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') AS dt_day,
            
            -- Week: YYYY + week number (01-53)
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyy') + FORMAT(DATEPART(WEEK, m.sample_date), '00') AS dt_week,
            
            -- Quarter: YYYYQ1, YYYYQ2, etc.
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyy') + 'Q' + CAST(DATEPART(QUARTER, m.sample_date) AS NVARCHAR(1)) AS dt_quarter,
            
            -- Shift: YYYYMMDD + shift (assuming shift_cd contains shift number)
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') + 
                    CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(m.shift_cd,'') = 'Early' THEN '01' 
                    WHEN ISNULL(m.shift_cd,'') = 'Late' THEN '02' 
                    WHEN ISNULL(m.shift_cd,'') = 'Night' THEN '03' 
                    ELSE '01' END  AS dt_shift,
            
            -- Hour: YYYYMMDD + hour (00-23)
            FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') + FORMAT(m.sample_date, 'HH') AS dt_hour
             
        FROM ipc.measurement m
        WHERE m.sample_date >= @StartDate 
          AND m.sample_date <= @EndDate
          AND m.is_active = 1  -- Only include active measurements
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM ipc.measurement_report mr WHERE mr.id = m.id
          );
        
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        
        -- Return summary information
        SELECT 
            COUNT(*) AS RecordsGenerated,
            MIN(m.sample_date) AS EarliestDate,
            MAX(m.sample_date) AS LatestDate
        FROM ipc.measurement m
        INNER JOIN ipc.measurement_report mr ON m.id = mr.id
        WHERE m.sample_date >= @StartDate AND m.sample_date <= @EndDate;
        
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
            
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END

storedProcedures.name: csp_graph_header_offline
storedProcedures.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_graph_header_offline

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_graph_header_offline;

--select * from [ipc].[vw_graph_header_offline]  where screenId =  and lotnr = 

CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_graph_header_offline]
 AS
 SELECT po.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    lot.lot_nr AS "LotNr",
    st.screen_id AS "ScreenId",
    ssl.test_cd AS "TestCd",
    mach.equipment_cd AS "MachineCd",
    mat.description AS "MaterialDescription",
    ssl.specification_set_cd AS "SpecificationSetCd"
	
   FROM sub.lot lot
     JOIN sub.process_order po ON lot.id = po.lot_id
     JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id
     JOIN ipc.specification_lot ssl ON ssl.lot_id = lot.id
     JOIN ( SELECT g.screen_id,
            min(g.test_cd) AS test_cd
           FROM ipc.graph g
             JOIN ipc.screen s ON g.screen_id = s.id
          GROUP BY g.screen_id) st ON ssl.test_cd = st.test_cd
     JOIN mas.material mat ON lot.material_cd = mat.material_cd AND mat.plant_cd = lot.plant_cd
     JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
	
  WHERE pos.step_cd = 'HCM';

storedProcedures.name: csp_iot_insert_current_measurement
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
	[ipc].[csp_iot_insert_current_measurement] 'BOR','HCM001','sep 1 2025 10:15:00','Counter 1',1000

	grant exezcute on [ipc].[csp_iot_insert_current_measurement] to public
*/



CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_iot_insert_current_measurement]
    @plant_cd NVARCHAR(50) ,
	@equipment_cd NVARCHAR(20) ,
	@measurement_date DATETIMEOFFSET(7),
	@tag_cd [NVARCHAR](50),
	@value [DECIMAL](10, 4)
   
AS



IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM [ipc].[iot_current_measurement] WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND equipment_cd = @equipment_cd AND tag_cd = @tag_cd)
BEGIN
	UPDATE [ipc].[iot_current_measurement] 
	SET [measurement_date] = @measurement_date,
		tag_cd = @tag_cd,
		[value] = @value
	WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND equipment_cd = @equipment_cd AND tag_cd = @tag_cd
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	INSERT INTO [ipc].[iot_current_measurement] 
	(plant_cd , equipment_cd, [measurement_date],[tag_cd],[value])
	SELECT @plant_cd, @equipment_cd, @measurement_date,@tag_cd,@value
END

UPDATE mas.equipment_tag
SET last_value = @value
FROM mas.equipment_tag et
INNER JOIN mas.equipment e  ON et.equipment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN ipc.tag t  ON t.id = et.tag_id
WHERE e.plant_cd = @plant_cd AND e.equipment_cd = @equipment_cd
AND t.tag_cd = @tag_cd
