storedProcedures.definition:
--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'BOR', NULL,'36742771',1,0

/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] TO [app_datawriters];
*/

--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'BOR', '4499872',NULL,0,1
--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'BOR', NULL,'36746481',1,1
--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'CMR','4503218', NULL,0,1
CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_lot_calc_spec_set]
     @plant_cd NVARCHAR(50)  = '',
	 @process_order_nr NVARCHAR(50) = '' ,
	 @lot_nr NVARCHAR(50) = '',
	 @analize_only bit = 0,
	 @update_to_lot_specification bit = 0
	
   
AS

DECLARE @log_action nvarchar(500)
DECLARE @log_starttime datetime
DECLARE @result		NVARCHAR(100)

DECLARE @lot_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER;

IF isnull(@plant_cd , '') <> '' AND isnull(@lot_nr , '') <> '' AND isnull(@process_order_nr , '') = ''  
BEGIN

	SELECT @process_order_nr = po.process_order_nr
	FROM sub.process_order po (NOLOCK)
	WHERE po.plant_cd = @plant_cd
	AND  po.lot_id = (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM sub.lot l (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND lot_nr = @lot_nr)

END


DECLARE @SpecSetCondition TABLE
(
    po_process_order_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_plant_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_process_order_nr NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lot_nr NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lot_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_customer_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_customer_cd_st NVARCHAR(50),
	po_customer_product_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_material_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_psn_cd NVARCHAR(50),

	po_size_design_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_pin_design_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_body_color_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_cap_color_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_polymer_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lod_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_pin_treatment_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_surface_treatment_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_weight_spec_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_manufacturing_type_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_equipment_model NVARCHAR(50),
	po_material_group_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_product_family_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_is_printed BIT,
	ConditionId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,                 -- c.id
    PlantCd NVARCHAR(50),                         -- c.plant_cd
    TestCd NVARCHAR(50),                          -- t.test_cd
    SpecificationSetTestCd NVARCHAR(50),         -- c.test_cd
    Priority INT,                                 -- c.priority
    SpecificationSetCd NVARCHAR(50),             -- c.specification_set_cd
    TestMode NVARCHAR(50),                        -- c.test_mode_cd
    TestType NVARCHAR(50),                        -- c.test_type_cd
    CustomerCd NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.customer_cd
	CustomerCdSt NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.customer_cd_st
    CustomerProductCd NVARCHAR(50),              -- c.customer_product_cd
    MaterialId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,                  -- c.material_id
    ProductFamilyCd NVARCHAR(50),                -- c.product_family_cd
	 SizeDesignCd NVARCHAR(50),                    -- c.size_design_cd
    PinDesignCd NVARCHAR(50),                     -- c.pin_design_cd
    BodyColorCd NVARCHAR(50),                     -- c.body_color_cd
    CapColorCd NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.cap_color_cd
    PolymerCd NVARCHAR(50),                       -- c.polymer_cd
    LodCd NVARCHAR(50),                           -- c.lod_cd
    PinTreatmentCd NVARCHAR(50),                  -- c.pin_treatment_cd
    SurfaceTreatmentCd NVARCHAR(50),              -- c.surface_treatment_cd
    WeightSpecCd NVARCHAR(50),                    -- c.weight_spec_cd
    ManufacturingTypeCd NVARCHAR(50),            -- c.manufacturing_type_cd
    IsPrinted BIT,                                -- c.is_printed
    EquipmentModel NVARCHAR(50),                  -- c.equipment_model
    MaterialGroupCd NVARCHAR(50),                 -- c.material_group_cd
    PsnCd NVARCHAR(50),                            -- c.psn_cd
    ConditionIsActive BIT,                        -- c.is_active
    ConditionCreatedDate DATETIMEOFFSET,          -- c.created_date
    ConditionLastEditDate DATETIMEOFFSET,        -- c.last_edit_date
	SpecSetId	UNIQUEIDENTIFIER, 
    Tgt FLOAT,                                    -- s.tgt
    Lsl FLOAT,                                    -- s.lsl
    Usl FLOAT,                                    -- s.usl
    Lsg FLOAT,                                    -- s.lsg
    Usg FLOAT,                                    -- s.usg
    Lwl FLOAT,                                    -- s.lwl
    Uwl FLOAT,                                    -- s.uwl
    Lrl FLOAT,                                    -- s.lrl
    Url FLOAT,                                    -- s.url
    ClMean FLOAT,                                 -- s.cl_mean
    ClLsigma FLOAT,                               -- s.cl_lsigma
    ClUsigma FLOAT,                               -- s.cl_usigma
    SampleSizeDefault INT,                        -- s.sample_size_default
    LslAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.lsl_alert_severity
    UslAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.usl_alert_severity
    LsgAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.lsg_alert_severity
    UsgAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.usg_alert_severity
    LwlAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.lwl_alert_severity
    UwlAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.uwl_alert_severity
    LclAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.lcl_alert_severity
    UclAlertSeverity INT,                         -- s.ucl_alert_severity
    SetIsActive BIT,                              -- s.is_active
    SetCreatedDate DATETIMEOFFSET,                -- s.created_date
    SetLastEditDate DATETIMEOFFSET,               -- s.last_edit_date
    UomCd NVARCHAR(50)   ,                         -- t.uom_cd
	TestIsActive bit,
	SpecSetIsActive bit,
	Removed bit,
	Removed_for_variable nvarchar(50),
	Rank_nr INT
);

/************************************************************************/
/* CALCULATE BY USING FUNCTION			[fn_lot_calc_spec_set]			*/
/************************************************************************/
INSERT INTO @SpecSetCondition
(	 po_process_order_id ,po_plant_cd, po_process_order_nr, po_lot_nr, po_lot_id, po_customer_cd ,po_customer_cd_st ,po_customer_product_cd ,po_material_id ,po_psn_cd ,po_size_design_cd ,
	po_pin_design_cd ,po_body_color_cd ,po_cap_color_cd ,po_polymer_cd ,po_lod_cd ,po_pin_treatment_cd ,po_surface_treatment_cd ,po_weight_spec_cd ,
	po_manufacturing_type_cd ,po_equipment_model ,po_material_group_cd ,po_product_family_cd ,po_is_printed ,
    ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd,  CustomerCdSt,  CustomerProductCd,
    MaterialId,    ProductFamilyCd,    SizeDesignCd,    PinDesignCd,    BodyColorCd,    CapColorCd,    PolymerCd,    LodCd,    PinTreatmentCd,    SurfaceTreatmentCd,
    WeightSpecCd,    ManufacturingTypeCd,    IsPrinted,    EquipmentModel,    MaterialGroupCd,    PsnCd,    ConditionIsActive,    ConditionCreatedDate,    ConditionLastEditDate,
    SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
    ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    SampleSizeDefault,
    LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,
    SetIsActive,    SetCreatedDate,    SetLastEditDate,    UomCd,  TestIsActive, SpecSetIsActive,
	Removed, Removed_for_variable, Rank_nr
)
SELECT  po_process_order_id ,po_plant_cd, po_process_order_nr, po_lot_nr,po_lot_id, po_customer_cd ,po_customer_cd_st ,po_customer_product_cd ,po_material_id ,po_psn_cd ,po_size_design_cd ,
	po_pin_design_cd ,po_body_color_cd ,po_cap_color_cd ,po_polymer_cd ,po_lod_cd ,po_pin_treatment_cd ,po_surface_treatment_cd ,po_weight_spec_cd ,
	po_manufacturing_type_cd ,po_equipment_model ,po_material_group_cd ,po_product_family_cd ,po_is_printed ,
    ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd,  CustomerCdSt,  CustomerProductCd,
    MaterialId,    ProductFamilyCd,    SizeDesignCd,    PinDesignCd,    BodyColorCd,    CapColorCd,    PolymerCd,    LodCd,    PinTreatmentCd,    SurfaceTreatmentCd,
    WeightSpecCd,    ManufacturingTypeCd,    IsPrinted,    EquipmentModel,    MaterialGroupCd,    PsnCd,    ConditionIsActive,    ConditionCreatedDate,    ConditionLastEditDate,
    SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
    ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    SampleSizeDefault,
    LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,
    SetIsActive,    SetCreatedDate,    SetLastEditDate,    UomCd,  TestIsActive, SpecSetIsActive,
	Removed, Removed_for_variable , rank_nr
FROM [ipc].[fn_spec_lot_calc_specset] (@plant_cd, @process_order_nr)

--get lot id
SELECT TOP 1 @lot_id = po_lot_id
FROM @SpecSetCondition


/************************************************************************/
/* RETURN SOME DATA TO ANALYZE									*/
/************************************************************************/

IF @analize_only = 1
BEGIN

		SELECT 'PROCESS ORDER DATA'
		SELECT top 1 po_process_order_id ,po_plant_cd, po_process_order_nr, po_lot_nr,po_lot_id, po_customer_cd ,po_customer_cd_st ,po_customer_product_cd ,po_material_id ,po_psn_cd ,po_size_design_cd ,
			po_pin_design_cd ,po_body_color_cd ,po_cap_color_cd ,po_polymer_cd ,po_lod_cd ,po_pin_treatment_cd ,po_surface_treatment_cd ,po_weight_spec_cd ,
			po_manufacturing_type_cd ,po_equipment_model ,po_material_group_cd ,po_product_family_cd ,po_is_printed
		FROM @SpecSetCondition


		SELECT 'ALL CONDITIONS' 
		SELECT Removed, Removed_for_variable  ,rank_nr,  ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd,  CustomerCdSt,  CustomerProductCd,
		MaterialId,    ProductFamilyCd,    SizeDesignCd,    PinDesignCd,    BodyColorCd,    CapColorCd,    PolymerCd,    LodCd,    PinTreatmentCd,    SurfaceTreatmentCd,
		WeightSpecCd,    ManufacturingTypeCd,    IsPrinted,    EquipmentModel,    MaterialGroupCd,    PsnCd,    ConditionIsActive,    ConditionCreatedDate,    ConditionLastEditDate,
		SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
		ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    SampleSizeDefault,
		LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,
		SetIsActive,    SetCreatedDate,    SetLastEditDate,    UomCd,  TestIsActive, SpecSetIsActive
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE removed = 0 
		ORDER BY Removed 


		SELECT 'EXISTING LOT SPECIFICATION RECORDS'
		SELECT *
		FROM ipc.specification_lot
		WHERE lot_id = @lot_id
		order by test_cd

		SELECT 'NEW SPECIFICATION RECORDS'
		SELECT   PlantCd,      SpecificationSetCd,   po_lot_id, TestCd, Tgt,   null, null,
				Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
				SampleSizeDefault,ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    
				LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,  LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,
				LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,       LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    
				conditionid, 1, TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0),TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0)
				Removed, Removed_for_variable  
				FROM @SpecSetCondition 
				WHERE Removed = 0
				----AND Rank_nr = 1
				order by testcd


END

--/************************************************************************/
--/* DETECT ALERTS			*/
--/************************************************************************/
BEGIN TRY
	IF @plant_cd in ('BOR', 'CMR', 'SAGA')
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @count int
		DECLARE @temp_aggr table ( test_cd nvarchar(50), spec_set_cd_rank1 nvarchar(50), priority_rank_1 int, nb_of_valid_specsets int, Specification_set_cd_list nvarchar(400))

		INSERT INTO @temp_aggr (test_cd, spec_set_cd_rank1, priority_rank_1 )
		SELECT TestCd, SpecificationSetCd, priority ---count(*), string_agg(SpecificationSetCd, ', ')
		FROM  @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE removed = 0 
		and rank_nr = 1

		UPDATE @temp_aggr
		SET nb_of_valid_specsets = i.count,
		Specification_set_cd_list = i.SpecSetCdList
		FROM (	SELECT count(*) 'Count', ta.test_cd 'TestCd', left(string_agg(convert(varchar(50),sc.SpecificationSetCd),', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sc.rank_nr ),400) 'SpecSetCdList'
				FROM @SpecSetCondition sc
				JOIN  @temp_aggr ta on  ta.test_cd = sc.TestCd AND  ta.priority_rank_1 = sc.Priority
				WHERE sc.removed = 0
				GROUP BY ta.test_cd) i
		WHERE test_cd = TestCd

		--select * from @temp_aggr

		--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'CMR','4503218', NULL,0,1

		SET @log_action = [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Plant', @plant_cd)  
						+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'PrO', @process_order_nr)

		IF (SELECT count(*) FROM @temp_aggr) = 0
		BEGIN
			SET @result = 'NOK - No spec found'
		END
		ELSE IF NOT exists (SELECT * FROM @temp_aggr WHERE nb_of_valid_specsets > 1)
		BEGIN
			SET @result = 'OK'
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			DECLARE @specification_set_cd_list nvarchar(400)
			SELECT top 1 @specification_set_cd_list = Specification_set_cd_list FROM @temp_aggr order by nb_of_valid_specsets desc
			SET @result = 'NOK - Conflicting conditions'
			SET @log_action = @log_action +  [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'SpecSetList', @specification_set_cd_list)
		END

		SET @log_starttime = getdate()

		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_lot_calc_spec_set','analyze',@plant_cd, 'SYSTEM', @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH
	END
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
END CATCH

/*
	SELECT top 1000 application, application_process, application_process_part, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), plant_cd, user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_lot_calc_spec_set'
	and mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long','') > '30-Sep-2025 14:26:18'
	--and plant_cd in ( 'CMR')
	--and message <> 'OK'
	ORDER BY created_date desc

*/



--/************************************************************************/
--/* INSERT INTO lot_specification			*/
--/************************************************************************/


IF  @update_to_lot_specification = 1 --and 1 = 2
BEGIN

	--BEGIN TRANSACTION;

	BEGIN TRY
		DELETE FROM ipc.specification_lot WHERE lot_id = @lot_id
	
		INSERT INTO ipc.specification_lot (
			   [plant_cd]           ,[specification_set_cd]           ,[lot_id]           ,[test_cd]           ,[tgt]           ,[lcl]           ,[ucl]
			   ,[lsl]           ,[usl]           ,[lsg]           ,[usg]           ,[lwl]           ,[uwl]           ,[lrl]           ,[url]
			   ,[sample_size]           ,[cl_mean]           ,[cl_lsigma]           ,[cl_usigma]         
			   ,[lcl_alert_severity]           ,[ucl_alert_severity]           ,[lsg_alert_severity]           ,[usg_alert_severity]
			   ,[lsl_alert_severity]           ,[usl_alert_severity]           ,[lwl_alert_severity]           ,[uwl_alert_severity]
			   ,[specification_set_condition_id]           ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	
		SELECT   PlantCd,      SpecificationSetCd,   po_lot_id, TestCd, Tgt,   null, null,
		Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
		SampleSizeDefault,ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    
		LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,  LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,
		LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,       LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    
		conditionid, 1, TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0),TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0), 'ipc_csp_lot_calc_spec_set'
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE Removed = 0  
		AND Rank_nr = 1

		SELECT SpecificationSetCd, STRING_AGG(TestCd, ', ') 'ApplicableTests'
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE Removed = 0  
		AND Rank_nr = 1
		GROUP BY SpecificationSetCd

	--	COMMIT;
	END TRY
	BEGIN CATCH
		--ROLLBACK;

		SELECT ERROR_MESSAGE();
		SELECT 'UPDATE TO lotspecification table failed'
	END CATCH

END

csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync
storedProcedures.definition:
/*

	SELECT top 100 application, application_process, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync'
	ORDER BY created_date desc
 */

/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync]TO [app_datawriters];
*/

--[ipc].[csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync] 'BOR', 'EtaTest', 'ELE','EtaTest'

CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync]
    @plant_cd nvarchar(50) ,
	@group_name nvarchar(50) ,
	@user_cd nvarchar(100),
	@old_group_name nvarchar(50) = ''  -- if the name of the group was update, the old name should be in this parameter
   
AS

BEGIN


	DECLARE @log_action nvarchar(500)
	DECLARE @log_starttime datetime
	DECLARE @result nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @type_of_sync nvarchar(50)

	


	--/*************************************************************************
	--GET DATA FROM THE SCREENGROUP
	--*************************************************************************/
	
	DECLARE @sg_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @sg_isactive bit

	SET @result = 'OK'
	SET  @log_starttime = getdate()


	--/*************************************************************************
	--LOGGING
	--*************************************************************************/
	SET @log_action = 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync' 
					+  mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Plant', @plant_cd)  +  mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('GroupName',@group_name) 
					+ mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Old Group Name', @old_group_name)  --+ mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Type', @type_of_sync)
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync','start', @plant_cd, @user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH

/*
	SELECT top 100 application, application_process,application_process_part, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync'
	ORDER BY created_date desc
*/


	SELECT @sg_id = id, @sg_isactive = is_active
	FROM ipc.screen_group 
	WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd and group_name = @group_name
	

	--/*************************************************************************
	--GET DATA FROM RBA
	--*************************************************************************/
	DECLARE @rba_cdm_application_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @rba_action_read_name NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @rba_action_read_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @rba_action_read_is_active BIT
	DECLARE @rba_action_addmeas_name NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @rba_action_addmeas_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @rba_action_addmeas_is_active BIT
	DECLARE @rba_action_updatestat_name NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @rba_action_updatestat_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
	DECLARE @rba_action_updatestat_is_active BIT
	DECLARE @old_record_read nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @new_record_read nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @old_record_addmeas nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @new_record_addmeas nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @old_record_updatestat nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @new_record_updatestat nvarchar(max)

	DECLARE @old_rba_action_read_name NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @old_rba_action_addmeas_name NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @old_rba_action_updatestat_name NVARCHAR(50)

	DECLARE @audit_descr nvarchar(255)
	DECLARE @audit_object_name  nvarchar(255)

	SELECT @rba_cdm_application_id  = id FROM rba.application WHERE application_cd = 'CDM'

	SELECT @rba_action_read_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @group_name + '_READ'
	SELECT @rba_action_addmeas_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @group_name + '_ADD_MEAS'
	SELECT @rba_action_updatestat_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @group_name + '_UPDATE_MEAS_STATUS'
		
	SELECT @old_rba_action_read_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @old_group_name + '_READ'
	SELECT @old_rba_action_addmeas_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @old_group_name + '_ADD_MEAS'
	SELECT @old_rba_action_updatestat_name = 'SG_' + @plant_cd + '_' + @old_group_name + '_UPDATE_MEAS_STATUS'




	
	--/*************************************************************************
	--DO UPDATES TO SYNC
	--*************************************************************************/
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	----SYNC 0. screen group is renamed, rename RBA Actions
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	IF isnull(@old_group_name,'')  <> '' AND @old_group_name <> @group_name
	BEGIN
		SELECT @type_of_sync = 'NAMECHANGE'

		-------GET OLD DATA OF RBA RECORD
		SELECT @rba_action_read_id = id, @rba_action_read_is_active = is_active 
		FROM rba.action
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_read_name
				
		SELECT @rba_action_addmeas_id = id, @rba_action_addmeas_is_active = is_active
		FROM rba.action
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_addmeas_name

		SELECT @rba_action_updatestat_id = id, @rba_action_updatestat_is_active = is_active
		FROM rba.action
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_updatestat_name


		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_read_id,@json_output = @old_record_read OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_addmeas_id,@json_output = @old_record_addmeas OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_updatestat_id,@json_output = @old_record_updatestat OUTPUT


		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET name = @rba_action_read_name,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_read_name

		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET name = @rba_action_addmeas_name,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_addmeas_name

		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET name = @rba_action_updatestat_name,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE name = @old_rba_action_updatestat_name

		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_read_id,@json_output = @new_record_read OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_addmeas_id,@json_output = @new_record_addmeas OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_updatestat_id,@json_output = @new_record_updatestat OUTPUT

				
		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_read_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_read_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_read, @new_record_read
		
		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_addmeas_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_addmeas_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_addmeas, @new_record_addmeas

		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_updatestat_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_updatestat_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_updatestat, @new_record_updatestat


	END


	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	----GET THE DATA FOR THE NEXT SYNCS
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	SELECT @rba_action_read_id = id, @rba_action_read_is_active = is_active
	FROM rba.action
	WHERE name = @old_rba_action_read_name

	SELECT @rba_action_addmeas_id = id, @rba_action_addmeas_is_active = is_active
	FROM rba.action
	WHERE name = @old_rba_action_addmeas_name

	SELECT @rba_action_updatestat_id = id, @rba_action_updatestat_is_active = is_active
	FROM rba.action
	WHERE name = @old_rba_action_updatestat_name

	EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_read_id,@json_output = @old_record_read OUTPUT
	EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_addmeas_id,@json_output = @old_record_addmeas OUTPUT
	EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_updatestat_id,@json_output = @old_record_updatestat OUTPUT


	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	----SYNC 1. screen group exists, rba action does not exist, do INSERT OF RBA ACTIONS
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	IF  @sg_id is not null AND @rba_action_read_id IS NULL  
			--AND NOT (isnull(@old_group_name,'')  <> '' AND @old_group_name <> @group_name)  --not renamed, because in that case no insert is needed
	BEGIN
		SELECT @type_of_sync = 'INSERT'
		
		-----------------------------INSERT RBA ACTIONS
		INSERT INTO [rba].[action]([application_id],[name]  ,[description] ,[is_active],[created_date] ,[last_edit_date] ,[modified_by])
		VALUES (@rba_cdm_application_id, @rba_action_read_name, 'Can see the screens in the ' + @group_name +' screengroup' , @sg_isactive, GETUTCDATE(),GETUTCDATE(),@user_cd)
		
		INSERT INTO [rba].[action]([application_id],[name]  ,[description] ,[is_active],[created_date] ,[last_edit_date] ,[modified_by])
		VALUES (@rba_cdm_application_id, @rba_action_addmeas_name, 'Can add measurements in the ' + @group_name +' screengroup' , @sg_isactive, GETUTCDATE(),GETUTCDATE(),@user_cd)

		INSERT INTO [rba].[action]([application_id],[name]  ,[description] ,[is_active],[created_date] ,[last_edit_date] ,[modified_by])
		VALUES (@rba_cdm_application_id, @rba_action_updatestat_name, 'Can update measurement status in the ' + @group_name +' screengroup' , @sg_isactive, GETUTCDATE(),GETUTCDATE(),@user_cd)
	

		----------------------------AUDIT TRAIL
		SELECT @rba_action_read_id = id FROM [rba].[action] WHERE application_id =@rba_cdm_application_id and  name = @rba_action_read_name
		SELECT @rba_action_addmeas_id = id FROM [rba].[action] WHERE application_id =@rba_cdm_application_id and  name = @rba_action_addmeas_name
		SELECT @rba_action_updatestat_id = id FROM [rba].[action] WHERE application_id =@rba_cdm_application_id and  name = @rba_action_updatestat_name
		
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_read_id,@json_output = @new_record_read OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_addmeas_id,@json_output = @new_record_addmeas OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_updatestat_id,@json_output = @new_record_updatestat OUTPUT

	
		SET @audit_descr = 'Added record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_read_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_read_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','CREATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@new_record_read, @new_record_read
		
		SET @audit_descr = 'Added record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_addmeas_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_addmeas_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','CREATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@new_record_addmeas, @new_record_addmeas

		SET @audit_descr = 'Added record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_updatestat_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_updatestat_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','CREATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@new_record_updatestat, @new_record_updatestat



	END
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	----SYNC 2.screen group exists , rba action exists, active flag different, set active flags the same
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	ELSE IF  @sg_id is not null AND @rba_action_read_id is not null  and @sg_isactive <> @rba_action_read_is_active
	BEGIN
		SELECT @type_of_sync = 'SYNC_ACTIVE_FLAG'
		

		--UPDATE ACTIONS
		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET is_active = @sg_isactive,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE id = @rba_action_read_id

		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET is_active = @sg_isactive,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE id = @rba_action_addmeas_id

		UPDATE [rba].[action]
		SET is_active = @sg_isactive,
		last_edit_date = GETUTCDATE(),
		modified_by = @user_cd
		WHERE id = @rba_action_updatestat_id

		--AUDIT TRAIL
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_read_id,@json_output = @new_record_read OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_addmeas_id,@json_output = @new_record_addmeas OUTPUT
		EXEC mas.csp_audittrail_tablerecord_to_json    'rba', 'Action', @rba_action_updatestat_id,@json_output = @new_record_updatestat OUTPUT

		
		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_read_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_read_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_read, @new_record_read
		
		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_addmeas_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_addmeas_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_addmeas, @new_record_addmeas

		SET @audit_descr = 'Updated record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_updatestat_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_updatestat_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','UPDATE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_updatestat, @new_record_updatestat

	
	END
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	----SYNC 3.screen group does not exist anymore, remove action and link to the roles where it appears
	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	ELSE IF  @sg_id is  null AND @rba_action_read_id is not null
	BEGIN
		SELECT @type_of_sync = 'DELETE ACTION AND ROLE'
		
		--Delete all role_actions for these actions
		DELETE FROM rba.role_action
		WHERE action_id in (@rba_action_read_id, @rba_action_addmeas_id, @rba_action_updatestat_id)
		
		------Delete all actions 
		DELETE FROM rba.action
		WHERE id in (@rba_action_read_id, @rba_action_addmeas_id, @rba_action_updatestat_id)
		
		--audit trail
		SET @audit_descr = 'Deleted record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_read_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_read_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','DELETE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_read, null
		
		SET @audit_descr = 'Deleted record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_addmeas_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_addmeas_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','DELETE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_addmeas, null

		SET @audit_descr = 'Deleted record ' + isnull(convert(nvarchar(50),@rba_action_updatestat_id),'')
		SET @audit_object_name = isnull(@rba_action_updatestat_id,'')
		EXEC [mas].[csp_audittrail_insert]'Rba','DELETE','Action',@audit_object_name  ,@user_cd,@audit_descr,@old_record_updatestat, null

		
		
	END






	--/*************************************************************************
	--RETURN THE RESULT
	--*************************************************************************/
	ENDOFPROC:

	SELECT   @result			AS 'Message'


	--/*************************************************************************
	--LOGGING
	--*************************************************************************/
	SET @log_action = 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync'  +  mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Plant', @plant_cd)  +  mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('GroupName',@group_name) 
					+ mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Old Group Name', @old_group_name)  + mas.fn_alphalog_create_part('Type', @type_of_sync)
		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync','end', @plant_cd, @user_cd, @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH

/*
	SELECT top 100 application, application_process, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_screengroup_rbaaction_sync'
	ORDER BY created_date desc
*/


END

storedProcedures.name: csp_spec_condition_get_affected_pro
csp_spec_lot_calc_specset
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::ipc.[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset] TO [app_datawriters];
*/

--ipc.[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset] 'BOR', '4499872',NULL,0,1
--ipc.[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset] 'BOR', NULL,'36746481',1,1
--ipc.[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset] 'CMR','4503218', NULL,0,1
CREATE PROCEDURE [ipc].[csp_spec_lot_calc_specset]
     @plant_cd NVARCHAR(50)  = '',
	 @process_order_nr NVARCHAR(50) = '' ,
	 @lot_nr NVARCHAR(50) = '',
	 @analize_only bit = 0,
	 @update_to_lot_specification bit = 0
	
   
AS

DECLARE @log_action nvarchar(500)
DECLARE @log_starttime datetime
DECLARE @result		NVARCHAR(100)

DECLARE @lot_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER;

IF isnull(@plant_cd , '') <> '' AND isnull(@lot_nr , '') <> '' AND isnull(@process_order_nr , '') = ''  
BEGIN

	SELECT @process_order_nr = po.process_order_nr
	FROM sub.process_order po (NOLOCK)
	WHERE po.plant_cd = @plant_cd
	AND  po.lot_id = (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM sub.lot l (NOLOCK) WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd AND lot_nr = @lot_nr)

END


DECLARE @SpecSetCondition TABLE
(
    po_process_order_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_plant_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_process_order_nr NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lot_nr NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lot_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_customer_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_customer_cd_st NVARCHAR(50),
	po_customer_product_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_material_id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
	po_psn_cd NVARCHAR(50),

	po_size_design_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_pin_design_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_body_color_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_cap_color_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_polymer_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_lod_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_pin_treatment_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_surface_treatment_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_weight_spec_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_manufacturing_type_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_equipment_model NVARCHAR(50),
	po_material_group_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_product_family_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	po_is_printed BIT,
	ConditionId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,                 -- c.id
    PlantCd NVARCHAR(50),                         -- c.plant_cd
    TestCd NVARCHAR(50),                          -- t.test_cd
    SpecificationSetTestCd NVARCHAR(50),         -- c.test_cd
    Priority INT,                                 -- c.priority
    SpecificationSetCd NVARCHAR(50),             -- c.specification_set_cd
    TestMode NVARCHAR(50),                        -- c.test_mode_cd
    TestType NVARCHAR(50),                        -- c.test_type_cd
    CustomerCd NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.customer_cd
	CustomerCdSt NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.customer_cd_st
    CustomerProductCd NVARCHAR(50),              -- c.customer_product_cd
    MaterialId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,                  -- c.material_id
    ProductFamilyCd NVARCHAR(50),                -- c.product_family_cd
	 SizeDesignCd NVARCHAR(50),                    -- c.size_design_cd
    PinDesignCd NVARCHAR(50),                     -- c.pin_design_cd
    BodyColorCd NVARCHAR(50),                     -- c.body_color_cd
    CapColorCd NVARCHAR(50),                      -- c.cap_color_cd

    SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,

    LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,

	po_manufacturing_type_cd ,po_equipment_model ,po_material_group_cd ,po_product_family_cd ,po_is_printed ,
    ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd,  CustomerCdSt,  CustomerProductCd,

--get lot id
SELECT TOP 1 @lot_id = po_lot_id
FROM @SpecSetCondition


/************************************************************************/
/* RETURN SOME DATA TO ANALYZE									*/
/************************************************************************/

IF @analize_only = 1
BEGIN

		SELECT 'PROCESS ORDER DATA'
		SELECT top 1 po_process_order_id ,po_plant_cd, po_process_order_nr, po_lot_nr,po_lot_id, po_customer_cd ,po_customer_cd_st ,po_customer_product_cd ,po_material_id ,po_psn_cd ,po_size_design_cd ,
			po_pin_design_cd ,po_body_color_cd ,po_cap_color_cd ,po_polymer_cd ,po_lod_cd ,po_pin_treatment_cd ,po_surface_treatment_cd ,po_weight_spec_cd ,
			po_manufacturing_type_cd ,po_equipment_model ,po_material_group_cd ,po_product_family_cd ,po_is_printed
		FROM @SpecSetCondition


		SELECT 'ALL CONDITIONS' 
		SELECT Removed, Removed_for_variable  ,rank_nr,  ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd,  CustomerCdSt,  CustomerProductCd,
		MaterialId,    ProductFamilyCd,    SizeDesignCd,    PinDesignCd,    BodyColorCd,    CapColorCd,    PolymerCd,    LodCd,    PinTreatmentCd,    SurfaceTreatmentCd,
		WeightSpecCd,    ManufacturingTypeCd,    IsPrinted,    EquipmentModel,    MaterialGroupCd,    PsnCd,    ConditionIsActive,    ConditionCreatedDate,    ConditionLastEditDate,
		SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
		ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    SampleSizeDefault,
		LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,
		SetIsActive,    SetCreatedDate,    SetLastEditDate,    UomCd,  TestIsActive, SpecSetIsActive
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE removed = 0 
		ORDER BY Removed 


		SELECT 'EXISTING LOT SPECIFICATION RECORDS'
		SELECT *
		FROM ipc.specification_lot
		WHERE lot_id = @lot_id
		order by test_cd

		SELECT 'NEW SPECIFICATION RECORDS'
		SELECT   PlantCd,      SpecificationSetCd,   po_lot_id, TestCd, Tgt,   null, null,
				Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
				SampleSizeDefault,ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    
				LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,  LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,
				LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,       LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    
				conditionid, 1, TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0),TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0)
				Removed, Removed_for_variable  
				FROM @SpecSetCondition 
				WHERE Removed = 0
				----AND Rank_nr = 1
				order by testcd


END

--/************************************************************************/
--/* DETECT ALERTS			*/
--/************************************************************************/
BEGIN TRY
	IF @plant_cd in ('BOR', 'CMR', 'SAGA')
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @count int
		DECLARE @temp_aggr table ( test_cd nvarchar(50), spec_set_cd_rank1 nvarchar(50), priority_rank_1 int, nb_of_valid_specsets int, Specification_set_cd_list nvarchar(400))

		INSERT INTO @temp_aggr (test_cd, spec_set_cd_rank1, priority_rank_1 )
		SELECT TestCd, SpecificationSetCd, priority ---count(*), string_agg(SpecificationSetCd, ', ')
		FROM  @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE removed = 0 
		and rank_nr = 1

		UPDATE @temp_aggr
		SET nb_of_valid_specsets = i.count,
		Specification_set_cd_list = i.SpecSetCdList
		FROM (	SELECT count(*) 'Count', ta.test_cd 'TestCd', left(string_agg(convert(varchar(50),sc.SpecificationSetCd),', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY sc.rank_nr ),400) 'SpecSetCdList'
				FROM @SpecSetCondition sc
				JOIN  @temp_aggr ta on  ta.test_cd = sc.TestCd AND  ta.priority_rank_1 = sc.Priority
				WHERE sc.removed = 0
				GROUP BY ta.test_cd) i
		WHERE test_cd = TestCd

		--select * from @temp_aggr

		--ipc.[csp_lot_calc_spec_set] 'CMR','4503218', NULL,0,1

		SET @log_action = [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'Plant', @plant_cd)  
						+ [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'PrO', @process_order_nr)

		IF (SELECT count(*) FROM @temp_aggr) = 0
		BEGIN
			SET @result = 'NOK - No spec found'
		END
		ELSE IF NOT exists (SELECT * FROM @temp_aggr WHERE nb_of_valid_specsets > 1)
		BEGIN
			SET @result = 'OK'
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			DECLARE @specification_set_cd_list nvarchar(400)
			SELECT top 1 @specification_set_cd_list = Specification_set_cd_list FROM @temp_aggr order by nb_of_valid_specsets desc
			SET @result = 'NOK - Conflicting conditions'
			SET @log_action = @log_action +  [mas].[fn_alphalog_create_part]( 'SpecSetList', @specification_set_cd_list)
		END

		SET @log_starttime = getdate()

		BEGIN TRY
			EXECUTE  [mas].[csp_alphalog_insert] 'CDM', 'csp_spec_lot_calc_specset','analyze',@plant_cd, 'SYSTEM', @result, @log_action, @log_starttime
		END TRY
		BEGIN CATCH
		END CATCH
	END
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
END CATCH

/*
	SELECT top 1000 application, application_process, application_process_part, mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''), plant_cd, user_cd, message, action, duration
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_spec_lot_calc_specset'
	and created_date > '30-Sep-2025 14:26:18'
	--and plant_cd in ( 'CMR')
	--and message <> 'OK'
	ORDER BY created_date desc

*/



--/************************************************************************/
--/* INSERT INTO lot_specification			*/
--/************************************************************************/


IF  @update_to_lot_specification = 1 --and 1 = 2
BEGIN

	--BEGIN TRANSACTION;

	BEGIN TRY
		DELETE FROM ipc.specification_lot WHERE lot_id = @lot_id
	
		INSERT INTO ipc.specification_lot (
			   [plant_cd]           ,[specification_set_cd]           ,[lot_id]           ,[test_cd]           ,[tgt]           ,[lcl]           ,[ucl]
			   ,[lsl]           ,[usl]           ,[lsg]           ,[usg]           ,[lwl]           ,[uwl]           ,[lrl]           ,[url]
			   ,[sample_size]           ,[cl_mean]           ,[cl_lsigma]           ,[cl_usigma]         
			   ,[lcl_alert_severity]           ,[ucl_alert_severity]           ,[lsg_alert_severity]           ,[usg_alert_severity]
			   ,[lsl_alert_severity]           ,[usl_alert_severity]           ,[lwl_alert_severity]           ,[uwl_alert_severity]
			   ,[specification_set_condition_id]           ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	
		SELECT   PlantCd,      SpecificationSetCd,   po_lot_id, TestCd, Tgt,   null, null,
		Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,   Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
		SampleSizeDefault,ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    
		LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,  LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,
		LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,       LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    
		conditionid, 1, TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0),TODATETIMEOFFSET(getutcdate() ,+0), 'csp_spec_lot_calc_specset'
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE Removed = 0  
		AND Rank_nr = 1

		SELECT SpecificationSetCd, STRING_AGG(TestCd, ', ') 'ApplicableTests'
		FROM @SpecSetCondition 
		WHERE Removed = 0  
		AND Rank_nr = 1
		GROUP BY SpecificationSetCd

	--	COMMIT;
	END TRY
	BEGIN CATCH
		--ROLLBACK;

		SELECT ERROR_MESSAGE();
		SELECT 'UPDATE TO lotspecification table failed'
	END CATCH

END

functions.name: fn_spec_lcl_calc
functions.definition:
/*
*/



CREATE FUNCTION [ipc].[fn_spec_lcl_calc]
(	@cl_mean real,
	@cl_lsigma real,
	@sample_size int
	
	

)
RETURNS real
AS
BEGIN
   DECLARE @ucl real

   If isnull(@sample_size,0) <> 0
   BEGIN
	SET @ucl = @cl_mean - (3*@cl_lsigma/SQRT(@sample_size))
   END
  
    RETURN @ucl
END

    ConditionId,    PlantCd,    TestCd,    SpecificationSetTestCd,    Priority,    SpecificationSetCd,    TestMode,    TestType,    CustomerCd, CustomerCdSt,   CustomerProductCd,
    MaterialId,    ProductFamilyCd,    SizeDesignCd,    PinDesignCd,    BodyColorCd,    CapColorCd,    PolymerCd,    LodCd,    PinTreatmentCd,    SurfaceTreatmentCd,
    WeightSpecCd,    ManufacturingTypeCd,    IsPrinted,    EquipmentModel,    MaterialGroupCd,    PsnCd,    ConditionIsActive,    ConditionCreatedDate,    ConditionLastEditDate,
    SpecSetId, Tgt,    Lsl,    Usl,    Lsg,    Usg,    Lwl,    Uwl,    Lrl,    Url,
    ClMean,    ClLsigma,    ClUsigma,    SampleSizeDefault,
    LslAlertSeverity,    UslAlertSeverity,    LsgAlertSeverity,    UsgAlertSeverity,    LwlAlertSeverity,    UwlAlertSeverity,    LclAlertSeverity,    UclAlertSeverity,
    SetIsActive,    SetCreatedDate,    SetLastEditDate,    UomCd,TestIsActive, SpecSetIsActive,
	0,null, null
FROM ipc.vw_specification_set_condition_expanded
WHERE PlantCd = @plant_cd;


/************************************************************************/
/* Remove all invalid conditions										*/
/************************************************************************/

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'PsnCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND PsnCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  PsnCd <> isnull(@psn_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @SpecSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'ConditionInactive'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND ConditionIsActive = 0

UPDATE @SpecSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'TestInactive' 
WHERE Removed = 0
AND TestIsActive = 0

UPDATE @SpecSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'SpecSetInactive' 
WHERE Removed = 0
AND SpecSetIsActive = 0

UPDATE @SpecSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'Plant' 
WHERE Removed = 0
AND PlantCd <> isnull(@plant_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'CustomerCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND CustomerCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  CustomerCd <> isnull(@customer_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'CustomerCdSt'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND CustomerCdSt IS NOT NULL 
AND  CustomerCdSt <> isnull(@customer_cd_st,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'CustomerProductCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND CustomerProductCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  CustomerProductCd <> ISNULL(@customer_product_cd,'Remove')


UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'MaterialId'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND MaterialId IS NOT NULL 
AND  MaterialId <> isnull(@material_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000')





UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'SizeDesignCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND SizeDesignCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  SizeDesignCd <> isnull(@size_design_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'PinDesignCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND PinDesignCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  PinDesignCd <> isnull(@pin_design_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'BodyColorCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND BodyColorCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  BodyColorCd <> isnull(@body_color_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'CapColorCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND CapColorCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  CapColorCd <> isnull(@cap_color_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'PolymerCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND PolymerCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  PolymerCd <>isnull(@polymer_cd,'Remove')


UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'LodCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND LodCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  LodCd <> isnull(@lod_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'PinTreatmentCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND PinTreatmentCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  PinTreatmentCd <> isnull(@pin_treatment_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'SurfaceTreatmentCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND SurfaceTreatmentCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  SurfaceTreatmentCd <> isnull(@surface_treatment_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'WeightSpecCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND WeightSpecCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  WeightSpecCd <> isnull(@weight_spec_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'ManufacturingTypeCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND ManufacturingTypeCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  ManufacturingTypeCd <> isnull(@manufacturing_type_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'ProductFamilyCd'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND ProductFamilyCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  ProductFamilyCd <> isnull(@product_family_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'EquipmentModel'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND EquipmentModel IS NOT NULL 
AND  EquipmentModel <> isnull(@equipment_model,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'MaterialGroup'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND MaterialGroupCd IS NOT NULL 
AND  MaterialGroupCd <> isnull(@material_group_cd,'Remove')

UPDATE @specSetCondition
SET Removed = 1, Removed_for_variable = 'IsPrinted'
WHERE Removed = 0
AND Isprinted IS NOT NULL 
AND  isprinted <> isnull(@is_printed,0)




/************************************************************************/
/* GIVE A RANK	TO THE NON-REMOVED (REMAINING CONDITIONS)				*/
/************************************************************************/
UPDATE ssc
SET rank_nr = help_rank.rn
FROM @SpecSetCondition ssc
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
        Id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY PlantCd, TestCd
            ORDER BY Priority DESC, ConditionLastEditDate DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM @SpecSetCondition
	WHERE Removed = 0
) help_rank ON ssc.id = help_rank.id
WHERE ssc.Removed = 0;


/************************************************************************/
/* RETURN				*/
/************************************************************************/
RETURN 

END

functions.name: fn_spec_ucl_calc
functions.definition:
/*
*/



CREATE FUNCTION [ipc].[fn_spec_ucl_calc]
(	@cl_mean real,
	@cl_usigma real,
	@sample_size int
	
	

)
RETURNS real
AS
BEGIN
   DECLARE @ucl real

   If isnull(@sample_size,0) <> 0
   BEGIN
	SET @ucl = @cl_mean + (3*@cl_usigma/SQRT(@sample_size))
   ENd
    RETURN @ucl
END

views.name: vw_lookup_workstation
views.definition:
-- View: mas.vw_lookupworkstation

--DROP VIEW mas.vw_lookup_workstation;

CREATE VIEW [mas].[vw_lookup_workstation]
 AS

 SELECT TOP 10000000
    e.id AS "Id",
    e.plant_cd AS "PlantCd",
    e.equipment_cd AS "EquipmentCd",
    e.description AS "Description",
    e.equipment_class_cd AS "EquipmentClassCd",
    l.area AS "Area",
    l.location AS "Location",
    e.created_date AS "CreatedDate",
    e.last_edit_date AS "LastEditDate"
   FROM mas.equipment e
     JOIN mas.equipment_class ec ON e.equipment_class_cd = ec.equipment_class_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.location l ON l.id = e.location_id
  WHERE e.is_active = 1 AND ec.category = 'WORKSTATION'
  ORDER BY e.plant_cd, e.equipment_cd;

/*
mas.[csp_equipment_hcm_view] 'BOR',null

grant execute on mas.[csp_equipment_hcm_view] to app_datareaders

*/


CREATE PROCEDURE [mas].[csp_equipment_hcm_view]
	@plant_cd		nvarchar(20),
	@equipment_cd	nvarchar(20)
AS
SELECT	e.id					AS 'EquipmentId',
		e.plant_cd				AS 'PlantCd',
		e.equipment_cd			AS 'EquipmentCd',
		e.equipment_class_cd	AS 'EquipmentClassCd',
		e.description			AS 'Description',
		e.equipment_nr			AS 'EquipmentNr',
		e.model					AS 'EquipmentModel',
		l.area					AS 'Area',
		l.location				AS 'Location',

		ISNULL((select top 1 ea.attribute_value
		from mas.equipment_attribute ea (nolock) 
		where ea.equipment_id = e.id and ea.attribute_key_cd = 'next_hcm_cd') ,'HCM'+ right('00' + cast(cast(right(e.equipment_cd,3) as int)+1 as varchar),3))  as 'NextHcmCd',

		ISNULL((select top 1 ea.attribute_value
		from mas.equipment_attribute ea (nolock) 
		where ea.equipment_id = e.id and ea.attribute_key_cd = 'prev_hcm_cd') ,'HCM'+ right('00' + cast(cast(right(e.equipment_cd,3) as int)-1 as varchar),3))   as 'PrevHcmCd',


		(select top 1 cast(ea.attribute_value as int) 
		from mas.equipment_attribute ea (nolock) 
		where ea.equipment_id = e.id and ea.attribute_key_cd = 'hcm_nb_of_pins')   as 'NrOfPins',

		'hcm_nb_of_pins' as 'NrOfPinsAttributeKey',

		(select top 1 case when ea.attribute_value = 'YES' then 1 else 0 END
		from mas.equipment_attribute ea (nolock) 
		where ea.equipment_id = e.id and ea.attribute_key_cd = 'inline')   as 'IsInline',

		'inline' as 'InlineAttributeKey',

		(select pcm.id from mas.equipment pcm (nolock) where pcm.parent_id = e.id and pcm.equipment_class_cd = 'PCM') as 'InlinePCMId',

		(select top 1 value 
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = e.equipment_cd and tag_cd = 'IBox RejectedRate') as 'IBoxRejectedRate',

		2.0  as 'IBoxRejectedRateLimit',

		'IBox RejectedRate' as 'IBoxRejectedRateTag',

		(select top 1 cast(value as int)
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = e.equipment_cd and tag_cd = 'Stas Code') as 'StasCode',

		'Stas Stopcode' as 'StasCodeTag',

		(select top 1 value 
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = e.equipment_cd and tag_cd = 'CapsInCartonHCM') as 'CapsInCartonHCM',
		'CapsInCartonHCM' as 'CapsInCartonHCMTag',

		(select top 1 value 
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = REPLACE(e.equipment_cd,'HCM','PCM') and tag_cd = 'CapsInCartonPCM') as 'CapsInCartonPCM',
		'CapsInCartonPCM' as 'CapsInCartonPCMTag',
		
		(select top 1 value 
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = e.equipment_cd and tag_cd = 'ILDNrCaps') as 'ILDNrCaps',
		'ILDNrCaps' as 'ILDNrCapsTag',

		(select top 1 value 
		from ipc.iot_current_measurement cm (nolock) 
		where cm.plant_cd = e.plant_cd and cm.equipment_cd = e.equipment_cd and tag_cd = 'ILDEnable') as 'ILDEnabled',
		'ILDEnabled' as 'ILDEnabledTag',

		(select count(ibox.id) from mas.equipment ibox (nolock) where ibox.parent_id = e.id and ibox.equipment_class_cd = 'IBOX') as 'HasIbox',
		(select count(ibox.id) 
		from mas.equipment ibox (nolock) 
		where ibox.parent_id in (select pcm.id from mas.equipment pcm (nolock) where pcm.parent_id = e.id and pcm.equipment_class_cd = 'PCM')
		and ibox.equipment_class_cd = 'VBOX') as 'HasVbox',

		(select top 1 moldsetbody.id
			from mas.equipment moldsetbody (nolock) 
			left join mas.equipment_attribute moldsetbody_attr (nolock) on moldsetbody.id = moldsetbody_attr.equipment_id and moldsetbody_attr.attribute_key_cd = 'side'
			where moldsetbody.parent_id = e.id and moldsetbody.equipment_class_cd = 'MOLDSET' and moldsetbody_attr.attribute_value = 'BODY') as 'MoldSetBodyId',

		(select top 1 moldsetcap.id
			from mas.equipment moldsetcap (nolock) 
			left join mas.equipment_attribute moldsetcap_attr (nolock) on moldsetcap.id = moldsetcap_attr.equipment_id and moldsetcap_attr.attribute_key_cd = 'side'
			where moldsetcap.parent_id = e.id and moldsetcap.equipment_class_cd = 'MOLDSET' and moldsetcap_attr.attribute_value = 'CAP') as 'MoldSetCapId'

FROM mas.equipment e (nolock)
LEFT JOIN mas.location l ON e.location_id = l.id
WHERE e.is_active = 1 
and e.equipment_class_cd = 'HCM'
and e.plant_cd = @plant_cd
and (e.equipment_cd = @equipment_cd or @equipment_cd is null)

fn_conv_dateoffset_to_delete
functions.definition:
/*

PARAMETERS:
Plant_Cd: --used in combination with @format and @timezone:
						- if the format parameter is 'long' or 'short', the plant record will be used to get the format from the format fields in the columns from the table
						- if the timezone paramter is not valid or '', the plant record will be used to get the timezone
Format: can be
	- 'long' (plant record will be used to get the format)
	- 'short' (plant table will be used to get the format) 
	- a valid datetime format (ex 'dd-MMM-yyyy HH:mm:ss')

Timezone:  can be
	- windows timezone
	- iana timezone 
	- offset (ex '+06:00') 
	- '' or not valid: the timezone of the plant record will be used

EXAMPLE:
MOST USED WITH THESE PARAMETERS:
SELECT [mas].[fn_conv_dateoffset](  '2025-07-25 16:12:42.2933333 +00:00', 'GWD','short','')  --Timezone:empty (= not valid) so take from plant, Format: take from the plant

OTHER POSSIBILITIES:
SELECT [mas].[fn_conv_dateoffset](  '2025-07-25 16:12:42.2933333 +00:00', 'PBL','short','Romance Standard Time')  --Timezone:Romance timezone, Format: take from the plant
SELECT [mas].[fn_conv_dateoffset](  '2025-07-25 16:12:42.2933333 +00:00', 'PBL','MMM-dd-yyyy HH:mm','Eastern Standard Time')  --Timezone:Eastern timezone, Format: use format from parameter
SELECT [mas].[fn_conv_dateoffset](  '2025-07-25 16:12:42.2933333 +00:00', 'PBL','MMM-dd-yyyy HH:mm','+02:00')  --Timezone:Eastern timezone, Format: use format from parameter
*/



CREATE FUNCTION [mas].[fn_conv_dateoffset_to_delete]
(	@input_dtoffset  DATETIMEOFFSET,
	@plant_cd nvarchar(50),  
	@format nvarchar(128) , 
	@timezone nvarchar(128)    
	
	

)
RETURNS nvarchar(50)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @localDateTime DATETIME 
	DECLARE @localDateTime_varchar NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @WindowsTimeZone NVARCHAR(100)
	DECLARE @localTime TIME
	DECLARE @shiftCode NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @returnFormat NVARCHAR(50)

	/***************************************************************/
	/*GET THE TIMEZONE												*/
	/***************************************************************/
	--check if timezone is an offset
	IF left(@timezone,1) in ('+','-')
	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
		WHERE UTCOffset = @timezone
	END

	----SELECT  TimeZoneWindows
	----	FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
	----	WHERE UTCOffset = '-10:00'
	
	------check if the timezone a windows timezone	
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
		WHERE TimeZoneWindows = @timezone
	END

	
		----check if an IANA timezone
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_iana]
		WHERE TimeZoneIana = @timezone 
	END

	--if nothing found, get the timezone from the plant that was passed
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT @WindowsTimeZone = timezone_windows FROM mas.plant WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END
	

	/***************************************************************/
	/*GET THE RETURN FORMAT												*/
	/***************************************************************/
	IF @format = 'short'
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = date_format_short +' '+ time_format_short
		FROM mas.plant (NOLOCK)
		WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END

	IF @format = 'long'
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = date_format_long +' '+ time_format_long
		FROM mas.plant (NOLOCK)
		WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END
	
	IF isnull(@returnFormat,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SET @returnFormat = @format
	END


	/***************************************************************/
	/*CONVERSION TO TIMEZONE									   */
	/***************************************************************/
	SET @LocalDateTime = CAST(
        SWITCHOFFSET(@input_dtoffset, '+00:00')   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'  -- Shift to UTC and  Tag as UTC
        AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone           -- Convert to target time zone
        AS DATETIME  --RETURN AS DATATIME (without offset)
    );


	SELECT @LocalDateTime =  CAST(@input_dtoffset AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone AS datetime2)
	
	
	IF isnull(@returnFormat,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = 'dd-MMM-yyyy HH:mm:ss'
	END


	SET @localDateTime_varchar =   CAST(FORMAT(@localDateTime, @returnFormat) AS nVARCHAR(50))
	
	--SET @localDateTime_varchar   = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50),@localDateTime)



    RETURN @localDateTime_varchar
END

	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
		WHERE UTCOffset = @timezone
	END

	----SELECT  TimeZoneWindows
	----	FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
	----	WHERE UTCOffset = '-10:00'
	
	------check if the timezone a windows timezone	
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_windows]
		WHERE TimeZoneWindows = @timezone
	END

	
		----check if an IANA timezone
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT top 1 @WindowsTimeZone = TimeZoneWindows
		FROM [Alpha].[mas].[vw_lookup_timezone_iana]
		WHERE TimeZoneIana = @timezone 
	END

	--if nothing found, get the timezone from the plant that was passed
	IF isnull(@WindowsTimeZone,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT @WindowsTimeZone = timezone_windows FROM mas.plant WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END
	

	/***************************************************************/
	/*GET THE RETURN FORMAT												*/
	/***************************************************************/
	IF @format = 'short'
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = date_format_short +' '+ time_format_short
		FROM mas.plant (NOLOCK)
		WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END

	IF @format = 'long'
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = date_format_long +' '+ time_format_long
		FROM mas.plant (NOLOCK)
		WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	END
	
	IF isnull(@returnFormat,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SET @returnFormat = @format
	END


	/***************************************************************/
	/*CONVERSION TO TIMEZONE									   */
	/***************************************************************/
	SET @LocalDateTime = CAST(
        SWITCHOFFSET(@input_dtoffset, '+00:00')   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'  -- Shift to UTC and  Tag as UTC
        AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone           -- Convert to target time zone
        AS DATETIME  --RETURN AS DATATIME (without offset)
    );


	SELECT @LocalDateTime =  CAST(@input_dtoffset AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone AS datetime2)
	
	
	IF isnull(@returnFormat,'') = ''
	BEGIN
		SELECT @returnFormat = 'dd-MMM-yyyy HH:mm:ss'
	END


	SET @localDateTime_varchar =   CAST(FORMAT(@localDateTime, @returnFormat) AS nVARCHAR(50))
	
	--SET @localDateTime_varchar   = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50),@localDateTime)



    RETURN @localDateTime_varchar
END

functions.name: fn_shift_get
functions.definition:
--SELECT [mas].[fn_get_shift_code_from_UTC_and_plant]( 'BOR', '2025-07-25 03:12:42.2933333 +00:00')

CREATE FUNCTION [mas].[fn_shift_get]
(	@plant_cd NVARCHAR(50),
    @DateTimeUTC DATETIMEOFFSET

)
RETURNS NVARCHAR(50)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @localDateTime DATETIME 
	DECLARE @WindowsTimeZone NVARCHAR(100)
	DECLARE @localTime TIME
	DECLARE @shiftCode NVARCHAR(50)

	SELECT @WindowsTimeZone = timezone_windows FROM mas.plant WHERE plant_cd = @plant_cd
	SET @localDateTime=  CAST( @DateTimeUTC AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'    AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone    AS DATETIME)

	SET @localTime = CAST(@localDateTime AS TIME)

    SELECT TOP 1 @shiftCode = shift_cd
    FROM mas.shift
    WHERE is_active = 1
	AND plant_cd = @plant_cd
      AND (
            -- Normal shift (start < end)
            (@localTime >= local_start_time AND @localTime < DATEADD(HOUR, duration, local_start_time))
            OR
            -- Overnight shift (start > end)
            (DATEADD(HOUR, duration, local_start_time) < local_start_time AND 
             (@localTime >= local_start_time OR @localTime < DATEADD(HOUR, duration, local_start_time)))
          )

    RETURN @shiftCode
END

functions.name: fn_split_index
functions.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [mas].[fn_split_index](@String nvarchar(4000), @Delimiter char(1), @item int)

RETURNS nvarchar(4000)

AS

    BEGIN

    DECLARE @nr INT

    DECLARE @INDEX INT

    DECLARE @SLICE nvarchar(4000)

    -- HAVE TO SET TO 1 SO IT DOESNT EQUAL Z

    --     ERO FIRST TIME IN LOOP

    SET @nr = 1

    SELECT @INDEX = 1

    WHILE @INDEX !=0

    BEGIN          

            -- GET THE INDEX OF THE FIRST OCCURENCE OF THE SPLIT CHARACTER

            SELECT @INDEX = CHARINDEX(@Delimiter,@STRING)

            -- NOW PUSH EVERYTHING TO THE LEFT OF IT INTO THE SLICE VARIABLE

            IF @INDEX !=0

                        SELECT @SLICE = LEFT(@STRING,@INDEX - 1)

            ELSE

                        SELECT @SLICE = @STRING

            -- PUT THE ITEM INTO THE RESULTS SET

            IF @nr = @item 

                          RETURN @SLICE

                        ELSE

                          SET @nr = @nr + 1

            -- CHOP THE ITEM REMOVED OFF THE MAIN STRING

            SELECT @STRING = RIGHT(@STRING,LEN(@STRING) - @INDEX)

            -- BREAK OUT IF WE ARE DONE

            IF LEN(@STRING) = 0 BREAK

    END

    RETURN NULL

END

functions.name: fn_timezone_get_offset
functions.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [mas].[fn_timezone_get_offset](@WindowsTimeZone NVARCHAR(128))
RETURNS NVARCHAR(6)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @Offset NVARCHAR(6)
    DECLARE @UTCTime DATETIME2 = GETUTCDATE()
    
    -- Get current offset in +HH:MM format using AT TIME ZONE (DST-aware)
    SELECT @Offset = FORMAT(@UTCTime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE @WindowsTimeZone, 'zzz')
    
    RETURN @Offset
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [rba].[csp_get_user_actions]
	@user_cd		nvarchar(50),
	@isemail		int = 0

AS

SELECT @user_cd = REPLACE(@user_cd,'LONZAGROUP\','')

SELECT  um.id				as 'Id',
		um.user_cd			as 'UserCd',
		um.first_name		AS 'FirstName',
		um.last_name		AS 'LastName',
		um.email			AS 'Email',
		um.phone			AS 'Phone',
		um.badge_code		AS 'BadgeCode',
		um.default_plant_cd	AS 'DefaultPlantCd',
		um.default_start_url AS 'DefaultStartUrl',
		um.language_cd		AS 'DefaultLanguageCd',

		up.plant_cd			AS 'PlantCd',

		ur.id				as 'RoleId',
		ur.role_cd			as 'RoleCd',

		rp.name				as 'RoleName',
		--rp.plant_cd			as 'PlantCd',
		p.timezone			as 'PlantTimeZone',
		rp.application_id	as 'ApplicationId',
		a.application_cd	as 'ApplicationCd',
		a.description		as 'ApplicationDescription',
		ra.action_id		as 'ActionId',
		ac.name				as 'ActionName'
FROM rba.user_mes um
INNER JOIN rba.user_allowed_plant up ON up.user_id = um.id and up.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN mas.plant p on p.plant_cd = um.default_plant_cd and p.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN rba.user_role ur on ur.user_id = um.id and ur.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN rba.role_plant rp on rp.id = ur.role_id AND rp.plant_cd = up.plant_cd and rp.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN rba.[application] a on a.id =rp.application_id   and a.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN rba.role_action ra on ra.role_id = ur.role_id and ra.is_active = 1
INNER JOIN rba.[action] ac on ac.id = ra.action_id  and ac.is_active = 1
WHERE (REPLACE(UPPER(um.user_cd),'LONZAGROUP\','') = UPPER(@user_cd) AND @isemail = 0)
or
(UPPER(um.email) = UPPER(@user_cd) AND @isemail = 1)

/*
SELECT um.user_cd,
	up.plant_cd,
	a.application_cd,
	rp.name,
	rp.description,
	ac.name,*
FROM rba.user_mes um
INNER JOIN rba.user_allowed_plant up ON up.user_id = um.id
INNER JOIN mas.plant p on p.plant_cd = up.plant_cd
INNER JOIN rba.user_role ur on ur.user_id = um.id
INNER JOIN rba.role_plant rp on rp.id = ur.role_id AND rp.plant_cd = up.plant_cd
INNER JOIN rba.[application] a on a.id =rp.application_id
INNER JOIN rba.role_action ra on ra.role_id = ur.role_id
INNER JOIN rba.[action] ac on ac.id = ra.action_id
WHERE um.user_cd= 'LONZAGROUP\BROELANT'

*/

functions.definition:
-- DROP FUNCTION  rba.fn_get_user_name
--SELECT rba.fn_get_user_name('elema')
CREATE FUNCTION [rba].[fn_get_user_name]
(
@user_general nvarchar(50)
)
RETURNS nvarchar(255)
AS
BEGIN
	-- Declare the return variable here
	DECLARE @user_name nvarchar(255)

	IF @user_general not like 'LONZAGROUP\%'
	BEGIN
		SET @user_general = 'LONZAGROUP\' + @user_general
	END

	SELECT @user_name = isnull(u.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(u.last_name ,'')
	FROM  rba.user_mes u 
	WHERE u.user_cd = @user_general;
    
    -- If no user is found, return a default message
    IF @user_name IS NULL 
	BEGIN
        SET @user_name =  replace(@user_general,'LONZAGROUP\', '');
    END

	-- Return the result of the function
	RETURN @user_name

END

views.name: vw_measurement
views.definition:
-- View: ipc.vw_measurement

--DROP VIEW ipc.vw_measurement;
--select top 100 * from [rpt].[vw_measurement]

CREATE VIEW [rpt].[vw_measurement]
 AS
SELECT meas.id AS 'MeasId',
    meas.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    t.test_cd AS 'TestCd',
    meq.equipment_cd AS 'MeasEquipment',
    l.lot_nr AS 'LotNr',
    mac.equipment_cd AS 'MachineNr',
	meas.sample_date AS 'SampleDate',
	meas.measurement_date AS 'MeasurementDate',
	CASE WHEN um.id is NULL THEN meas.user_cd ELSE  isnull(um.first_name,'') + ' ' + isnull(um.last_name ,'') END AS 'UserCd',
    meas.sample_size AS 'SampleCount',
    meas.avg_value AS 'AvgValue',
	meas.uom_cd AS 'UomCd',
	meas.range AS 'Range',
	sl.tgt AS 'Tgt',
	sl.specification_set_cd 'SpecificationSetCd',
    meas.lcl_actual AS 'Lcl',
	meas.ucl_actual AS 'Ucl',
    sl.lsl AS 'Lsl',
    sl.usl AS 'Usl',
    sl.lsg AS 'Lsg',
    sl.usg AS 'Usg',
    sl.lwl AS 'Lwl',
    sl.uwl AS 'Uwl',
    meas.measurement_status AS 'MeasurementStatus',
    meas.shift_cd AS 'ShiftCd',
    meas.created_date AS 'CreatedDate'  ,
	po.process_order_nr 'ProcessOrderNr',
	po.customer_cd 'CustomerCd',
	mat.size_design_cd 'SizeDesignCd', 
	mat.polymer_cd 'PolymerCd',
	mat.weight_spec_cd 'WeightSpecCd',
	t.test_mode_cd 'TestModeCd',
	t.test_type_cd 'TestTypeCd',
	mac.model 'HCM Model', 
    FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyy') AS dt_year, -- Year: YYYY
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyyMM') AS dt_month,-- Month: YYYYMM
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') AS dt_day,---- Day: YYYYMMDD
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyy') + FORMAT(DATEPART(WEEK, meas.sample_date), '00') AS dt_week, ---- Week: YYYY + week number (01-53)
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyy') + 'Q' + CAST(DATEPART(QUARTER, meas.sample_date) AS NVARCHAR(1)) AS dt_quarter,---- Quarter: YYYYQ1, YYYYQ2, etc.
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') + 
                    CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(meas.shift_cd,'') = 'Early' THEN '01' 
                    WHEN ISNULL(meas.shift_cd,'') = 'Late' THEN '02' 
                    WHEN ISNULL(meas.shift_cd,'') = 'Night' THEN '03' 
                    ELSE '01' END  AS dt_shift, ---- Shift: YYYYMMDD + shift (assuming shift_cd contains shift number)
	FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'yyyyMMdd') + FORMAT(meas.sample_date, 'HH') AS dt_hour---- Hour: YYYYMMDD + hour (00-23)

   
   FROM ipc.measurement meas
     JOIN ipc.test t ON t.test_cd = meas.test_cd AND t.is_active = 1
	 JOIN ipc.test_mode tm on t.test_mode_cd = tm.test_mode_cd
	 JOIN ipc.test_type tt on t.test_type_cd = tt.test_type_cd
	 LEFT JOIN mas.equipment meq ON meq.id = meas.meas_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN ipc.specification_lot sl ON sl.lot_id = meas.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = meas.test_cd
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = meas.lot_id
	 LEFT JOIN sub.process_order po on po.lot_id = l.id
	 LEFT JOIN mas.material mat on po.material_cd = mat.material_cd and mat.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mac ON mac.id = meas.machine_equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.team_calendar tc ON meas.team_calendar_id = tc.id
	 LEFT JOIN rba.user_mes um on meas.user_cd = um.user_cd
  WHERE meas.is_active = 1 
  AND meas.measurement_status = 'Active'

storedProcedures.name: csp_cdm_capability
storedProcedures.definition:
-- rpt.[csp_cdm_capability] 'sep 18 2025', 'sep 19 2025', 'A_I_WGT BC'

/*
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::rpt.[csp_cdm_capability] TO [app_datareaders];
GRANT EXECUTE ON OBJECT::rpt.[csp_cdm_capability] TO [app_datawriters];
*/

/*
[rpt].[csp_cdm_capability]
*/
CREATE  PROCEDURE [rpt].[csp_cdm_capability]
	@sample_date_start datetime ,
	@sample_date_end	datetime ,
    @test_cd NVARCHAR(50) ,
	@size_cd NVARCHAR(50) = null

   
AS


DECLARE @statistics table (group_nb int, plant_cd nvarchar(50),test_cd nvarchar(50),size_design_cd nvarchar(50),specification_set_cd nvarchar(50),tgt float, lsl float, usl float, count int,  avg float , stddevP float, pp float, ppk float)


--AS
--BEGIN

DECLARE @md table (group_nb int, plant_cd nvarchar(50),measurement_id uniqueidentifier, value real, test_cd nvarchar(50),size_design_cd nvarchar(50),specification_set_cd nvarchar(50),tgt float, lsl float, usl float,  avg_by_group float , stddevP float, pp float, ppk float)
INSERT INTO @md (group_nb , plant_cd ,measurement_id , value , test_cd,size_design_cd,specification_set_cd , tgt, lsl, usl)
SELECT 
DENSE_RANK() OVER (order by m.plant_cd, m.test_cd, specification_set_cd),
m.plant_cd, md.id, md.value, m.test_cd, mat.size_design_cd, sl.specification_set_cd,
sl.tgt, sl.lsl, sl.usl
FROM ipc.measurement_detail md
JOIN ipc.measurement m on md.measurement_id = m.id
JOIN ipc.specification_lot sl ON sl.lot_id = m.lot_id AND sl.test_cd = m.test_cd
JOIN sub.process_order po on po.lot_id = sl.lot_id
JOIN mas.material mat on po.material_cd = mat.material_cd and mat.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
WHERE m.sample_date between @sample_date_start and @sample_date_end
and m.test_cd = @test_cd 
and (mat.size_design_cd = @size_cd or isnull(@size_cd,'') = '')
and m.measurement_status = 'Active'


UPDATE md
SET avg_by_group = g.avgvalue
FROM @md md
JOIN (
	SELECT group_nb, avg(value) as AvgValue
	FROM @md
	GROUP BY group_nb) g on md.group_nb = g.group_nb

--SELECT * FROM @md

INSERT INTO @statistics (group_nb, plant_cd ,test_cd ,size_design_cd ,specification_set_cd ,tgt,lsl , usl , count, avg)
SELECT group_nb, plant_cd ,test_cd ,size_design_cd ,specification_set_cd ,tgt,lsl , usl , count(*), avg_by_group
FROM @md
GROUP BY  group_nb,plant_cd ,test_cd ,size_design_cd ,specification_set_cd ,tgt, lsl , usl ,avg_by_group





UPDATE s
SET StdDevP = md.StdDevP
FROM @statistics s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        group_nb,
        SQRT(SUM(POWER(Value - avg_by_group, 2)) / count(*)) AS StdDevP
    FROM @md
    GROUP BY group_nb) md ON  s.group_nb = md.group_nb

UPDATE @statistics
SET Pp = (usl-lsl)/(6*stddevP),
ppk = LEAST(avg - lsl, usl - avg)/(3*stddevP)


SELECT plant_cd 'Plant',test_cd 'Test' ,size_design_cd 'Size' ,specification_set_cd 'SpecSet' ,tgt,lsl , usl ,  round(avg,2) 'avg',  round(stddevP,2) 'stdDevP',  round(pp,2) 'Pp',  round(ppk,2) 'Ppk'
FROM @statistics
ORDER BY size_design_cd

/*
 rpt.[csp_cdm_capability] 'sep 18 2025', 'sep 19 2025', 'A_I_WGT BC'
 */

storedProcedures.name: csp_cdm_global_measurement_by test
storedProcedures.definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [rpt].[csp_cdm_global_measurement_by test]
    @plant_cd NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
    @test_cd NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
    @shift_cd NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
    @page INT = 0,
    @size INT = 200
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    IF @page < 0 SET @page = 0;
    IF @size <= 0 SET @size = 200;
    IF @size > 1000 SET @size = 1000; 
    
    DECLARE @offset INT = @page * @size;
    
    SELECT 
        [id],
        [plant_cd],
        [meas_equipment_id],
        [machine_equipment_id],
        [lot_id],
        [sublot_id],
        [test_cd],
        [sample_date],
        [sample_size],
        [uom_cd],
        [location_id],
        [description],
        [description2],
        [avg_value],
        [lcl_actual],
        [ucl_actual],
        [range],
        [user_cd],
        [original_key],
        [measurement_date],
        [measurement_status],
        [shift_cd],
        [team_calendar_id],
        [is_active],
        [created_date],
        [last_edit_date],
        [last_edit_user_cd]
    FROM [Alpha].[ipc].[measurement]
    WHERE 
        (@plant_cd IS NULL OR [plant_cd] = @plant_cd)
        AND (@test_cd IS NULL OR [test_cd] = @test_cd)
        AND (@shift_cd IS NULL OR [shift_cd] = @shift_cd)
    ORDER BY sample_date desc
    OFFSET @offset ROWS
    FETCH NEXT @size ROWS ONLY;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [rpt].[csp_cdm_spec_limits]
    @plant_cd NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
    @test_cd NVARCHAR(50) = NULL
   
AS

SELECT [PlantCd]
      ,[TestCd]
      ,[SpecificationSetCd]
      ,[SpecificationSetDescr]
      ,[tgt]
      ,[lsl]
      ,[usl]
      ,[lsg]
      ,[usg]
      ,[lwl]
      ,[uwl]
      ,[lrl]
      ,[url]
      ,[LclDefault]
      ,[UclDefault]
      ,[ClMean]
      ,[ClLSigma]
      ,[ClUSigma]
      ,[SampleSizeDefault]
      ,[LslSeverity]
      ,[UslSeverity]
      ,[LsgSeverity]
      ,[UsgSeverity]
      ,[LwlSeverity]
      ,[UwlSeverity]
      ,[LclSeverity]
      ,[UclSeverity]
      ,mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv(CreatedDate,[PlantCd], 'yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm','') 'CreatedDate'
      ,mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv([LastEditDate],[PlantCd], 'yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm','') 'LastEditDate'
      ,[LastEditUser]
  FROM [ipc].[vw_specification_set_limit]
  WHERE ([PlantCd] = @plant_cd or  isnull(@plant_cd,'') = '')
  AND ([TestCd] = @test_cd or  isnull(@test_cd,'') = '')
  ORDER BY PlantCd, [SpecificationSetCd], TestCd

--[rpt].[csp_datacheck_condition_to_pro_assignment] 'sep 29 2025' , 'oct 01 2025'

CREATE PROCEDURE [rpt].[csp_datacheck_condition_to_pro_assignment]
  @from datetime,
  @to datetime
   
AS
	SELECT   max(mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long',''))'created_date', plant_cd,  message, action
	FROM mas.alpha_log 
	where application_process = 'csp_lot_calc_spec_set'
	and application_process_part = 'analyze'
	and mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long','') between  @from and @to
	and plant_cd in ( 'CMR','BOR')
	and message <> 'OK'
	GROUP BY plant_cd,  message, action
	ORDER BY  max(mas.fn_datetimeoffset_conv( created_date, 'BOR','long','')) desc
