-- View: sub.vw_process_order

--DROP VIEW sub.vw_process_order;

CREATE VIEW [sub].[vw_process_order]
 AS
SELECT po.id AS 'ProcessOrderId',
    po.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    po.process_order_nr AS 'ProcessOrderNr',
    po.material_cd,
    m.id AS 'MaterialId',
    m.material_cd AS 'MaterialCd',
    m.description AS 'MaterialDescription',
    m.size_design_cd AS 'SizeDesignCd',
	po.pin_design_cd AS 'PinDesignCd',
    po.quantity AS 'ProcessOrderQuantity',
    po.uom_cd AS 'ProcessOrderUomCd',
    po.process_order_type AS 'ProcessOrderType',
    po.process_order_status_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStatusCd',
    po.manufacturing_type_cd AS 'ManufacturingTypeCd',
    l.lot_nr AS 'ProductionLotNr',
    sl.lot_nr AS 'ShipLotNr',
    l.id AS 'ProductionLotId',
    sl.id AS 'ShipLotId',
    pos.id AS 'ProcessOrderStepId',
    pos.step_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStepCd',
    pos.process_order_step_status_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStepStatusCd',
    isnull(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date) AS 'ActualStartDate',
    isnull(pos.actual_stop_date,pos.expected_stop_date) AS 'ActualStopDate',
    pos.expected_start_date AS 'ExpectedStartDate',
    pos.expected_stop_date AS 'ExpectedStopDate',
    mach.equipment_cd AS 'MachineCd',
    mach.description AS 'MachineDescription',
    po.created_date AS 'ProcessOrderCreatedDate',
    po.last_edit_date AS 'ProcessOrderLastEditDate'
   FROM sub.process_order po
     JOIN mas.material m ON m.material_cd = po.material_cd AND m.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
     JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON po.id = pos.process_order_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = po.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot sl ON sl.id = po.ship_lot_id;

	m.id AS 'MaterialId',
	m.psn_cd AS 'PsnCd',
	--mg.product_family_cd AS 'ProductType', 
	m.size_design_cd AS 'SizeDesignCd',
	po.pin_design_cd as 'PinDesignCd',
	m.body_color_cd AS 'BodyColorCd', 
	m.cap_color_cd AS 'CapColorCd',  
	m.polymer_cd AS 'PolymerCd',
	m.lod_cd AS 'LODCd',  
	m.pin_treatment_cd AS 'PinTreatmentCd',  
	m.surface_treatment_cd AS 'SurfaceTreatmentCd',  
	m.weight_spec_cd AS 'WeightSpecCd', 
	po.manufacturing_type_cd AS 'ManufacturingTypeCd',
	e.model AS 'EquipmentModelCd', 
	m.material_group_cd AS 'MaterialGroupCd',
	mg.product_family_cd AS 'ProductFamilyCd', 
	coalesce(pt.is_printed, 0) 'IsPrinted' ,
	pos.process_order_step_status_cd 'ProcessOrderStepStatusCd'
    
   FROM sub.process_order po (NOLOCK)
	 JOIN sub.lot l (NOLOCK) on  l.plant_cd = po.plant_cd AND l.id = po.lot_id
     JOIN mas.material m (NOLOCK) ON m.material_cd = po.material_cd AND m.plant_cd = po.plant_cd

	 LEFT JOIN mas.print_type pt (NOLOCK) on m.print_type_cd = pt.print_type_cd
	 JOIN sub.process_order_step pos (NOLOCK) on pos.process_order_id = po.id and pos.step_cd = 'HCM'
	 LEFT JOIN mas.equipment e (NOLOCK) on pos.equipment_id = e.id

storedProcedures.name: csp_get_process_order_list
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
exec [sub].[csp_get_process_order_list] 'BOR','447487%'

exec [sub].[csp_get_process_order_list] 'BOR','447487*'

exec [sub].[csp_get_process_order_list] 'BOR',null, '36740041'

exec [sub].[csp_get_process_order_list] 'BOR',null,null,'HCM','dec 1 2025','dec 2 2025',0,1000


*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [sub].[csp_get_process_order_list]
    @PlantCd                NVARCHAR(10),
    @ProcessOrderNr         NVARCHAR(50) = null,
    @ProdLotNr              NVARCHAR(50) = null,
    @StepFilter             NVARCHAR(50) = null,
    @StartDateFrom          Datetime = null,
    @StartDateTo             Datetime = null,

    @skip int = 0,   --number of rows in the query that will be skipped, these are the first x rows
    @take int = 100  -- number of rows to return


AS

SELECT @ProcessOrderNr = REPLACE(@ProcessOrderNr,'*','%')
SELECT @ProdLotNr = REPLACE(@ProdLotNr,'*','%')

DECLARE @po_id_list     TABLE (id [uniqueidentifier])

if @StepFilter is not null
BEGIN
    insert into @po_id_list
    select pos.process_order_id
    from process_order_step pos (nolock)
    where pos.step_cd = @StepFilter
    and isnull(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date) between @StartDateFrom and @StartDateTo

END


SELECT po.id AS 'ProcessOrderId',
    po.plant_cd AS 'PlantCd',
    po.process_order_nr AS 'ProcessOrderNr',
    po.material_cd,
    m.id AS 'MaterialId',
    m.material_cd AS 'MaterialCd',
    m.description AS 'MaterialDescription',
    m.size_design_cd AS 'SizeDesignCd',
	po.pin_design_cd AS 'PinDesignCd',
    po.quantity AS 'ProcessOrderQuantity',
    po.uom_cd AS 'ProcessOrderUomCd',
    po.process_order_type AS 'ProcessOrderType',
    po.process_order_status_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStatusCd',
    po.manufacturing_type_cd AS 'ManufacturingTypeCd',
    l.lot_nr AS 'ProductionLotNr',
    sl.lot_nr AS 'ShipLotNr',
    l.id AS 'ProductionLotId',
    sl.id AS 'ShipLotId',
    pos.id AS 'ProcessOrderStepId',
    pos.step_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStepCd',
    pos.process_order_step_status_cd AS 'ProcessOrderStepStatusCd',
    isnull(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date) AS 'ActualStartDate',
    isnull(pos.actual_stop_date,pos.expected_stop_date) AS 'ActualStopDate',
    pos.expected_start_date AS 'ExpectedStartDate',
    pos.expected_stop_date AS 'ExpectedStopDate',
    mach.equipment_cd AS 'MachineCd',
    mach.description AS 'MachineDescription',
    po.created_date AS 'ProcessOrderCreatedDate',
    po.last_edit_date AS 'ProcessOrderLastEditDate'
   FROM sub.process_order po (nolock)
     JOIN mas.material m (nolock) ON m.material_cd = po.material_cd AND m.plant_cd = po.plant_cd
     JOIN sub.process_order_step pos (nolock) ON po.id = pos.process_order_id
     LEFT JOIN mas.equipment mach (nolock) ON mach.id = pos.equipment_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot l (nolock) ON l.id = po.lot_id
     LEFT JOIN sub.lot sl (nolock) ON sl.id = po.ship_lot_id
WHERE (po.plant_cd = @PlantCd or @PlantCd is null)
AND (po.process_order_nr like @ProcessOrderNr or @ProcessOrderNr is null)
AND (l.lot_nr like @ProdLotNr or @ProdLotNr is null)
and (po.id in (select id from @po_id_list) or (select count(id) from @po_id_list) = 0)
ORDER BY po.id OFFSET @skip ROWS FETCH NEXT @take ROWS ONLY

storedProcedures.name: csp_get_process_order_steps
storedProcedures.definition:
/*

exec [sub].[csp_get_process_order_steps] '17E36EE6-ED71-F011-82D5-0050569AA23B'
*/


CREATE PROCEDURE [sub].[csp_get_process_order_steps]
    @processOrderId     UNIQUEIDENTIFIER

 AS
SELECT  pos.id                                  AS 'ProcessOrderStepId',
        pos.process_order_id                    AS 'ProcessOrderId',
        pos.quantity                            AS 'Quantity',
        pos.uom_cd                              AS 'UomCd',
        pos.step_cd                             AS 'ProcessOrderStepCd',
        pos.process_order_step_status_cd        AS 'ProcessOrderStepStatusCd',
        pos.actual_start_date                   AS 'ActualStartDate',
        pos.actual_stop_date                    AS 'ActualStopDate',
        pos.expected_start_date                 AS 'ExpectedStartDate',
        pos.expected_stop_date                  AS 'ExpectedStopDate',
        e.equipment_cd                          AS 'MachineCd',
        e.description                           AS 'MachineDescription',
        e.id                                    AS 'EquipmentId',


        CASE 
            WHEN pos.step_cd = 'GFT' THEN (SELECT TOP 1 posnext.id 
                                            FROM sub.process_order_step posnext 
                                            WHERE posnext.process_order_id = pos.process_order_id AND posnext.step_cd = 'HCM')
            WHEN pos.step_cd = 'HCM' THEN (SELECT TOP 1 posnext.id 
                                            FROM sub.process_order_step posnext 
                                            WHERE posnext.process_order_id = pos.process_order_id AND posnext.step_cd IN ('PCM','FINISH'))
            WHEN pos.step_cd = 'PCM' THEN (SELECT TOP 1 posnext.id 
                                            FROM sub.process_order_step posnext 
                                            WHERE posnext.process_order_id = pos.process_order_id AND posnext.step_cd IN ('FINISH'))
            ELSE NULL END AS 'NextProcessOrderStepId',


        (SELECT TOP 1 nextpro.process_order_id FROM sub.process_order_step nextpro 
                        WHERE ISNULL(nextpro.actual_start_date,nextpro.expected_start_date) > ISNULL(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date)
                        AND pos.equipment_id = nextpro.equipment_id
                        ORDER BY ISNULL(nextpro.actual_start_date,nextpro.expected_start_date)) AS 'NextProcessOrderId',

        (SELECT TOP 1 nextpro.process_order_id FROM sub.process_order_step nextpro 
                        WHERE ISNULL(nextpro.actual_start_date,nextpro.expected_start_date) < ISNULL(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date)
                        AND pos.equipment_id = nextpro.equipment_id
                        ORDER BY ISNULL(nextpro.actual_start_date,nextpro.expected_start_date) DESC ) AS 'PrevProcessOrderId'



   FROM sub.process_order_step pos
   LEFT JOIN mas.equipment e ON e.id = pos.equipment_id 
    WHERE pos.process_order_id = @processOrderId

storedProcedures.name: csp_lot_get_by_equipment
storedProcedures.definition:
/*
[sub].[csp_lot_get_by_equipment] 'BOR','HCM',null

[sub].[csp_lot_get_by_equipment] 'BOR','HCM','HCM009','sep 25 2025','sep 30 2025'
[sub].[csp_lot_get_by_equipment] 'BOR','HCM',null,'sep 25 2025','sep 30 2025'

grant execute on sub.csp_lot_get_by_equipment to app_datareaders
*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [sub].[csp_lot_get_by_equipment]
	@plant_cd			NVARCHAR(50),
	@equipment_class_cd NVARCHAR(50),
	@equipment_cd		NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
	@fromdate			DATETIME = NULL,
	@todate				DATETIME = NULL

AS

SELECT @fromdate = ISNULL(@fromdate, DATEADD(dd,-10,GETDATE()))
SELECT @todate = ISNULL(@todate, DATEADD(dd,60, GETDATE()))


SELECT po.plant_cd				'PlantCd',
		po.process_order_nr		'ProcessOrderNr',
		e.equipment_cd			'EquipmentCd',
		e.equipment_class_cd	'EquipmentClassCd',
		m.material_cd			'MaterialCd',
		m.description			'MaterialDescription',
		po.quantity				'PoQuantity',
		l.lot_nr				'LotNr',
		pos.process_order_step_status_cd						'StatusCd',
		ISNULL(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date)	'StartDate',
		ISNULL(pos.actual_stop_date,pos.expected_stop_date)		'StopDate',
		m.size_design_cd		'SizeDesignCd',
		m.polymer_cd			'PolymerCd',
		m.material_group_cd		'MaterialGroupCd',
		m.body_color_cd			'BodyColorCd',
		m.cap_color_cd			'CapColorCd'
FROM sub.process_order po
INNER JOIN mas.material m ON po.material_cd = m.material_cd AND po.plant_cd = m.plant_cd
INNER JOIN sub.lot l ON l.id = po.lot_id
INNER JOIN sub.process_order_step pos ON pos.process_order_id = po.id
INNER JOIN mas.equipment e ON pos.equipment_id = e.id
WHERE e.plant_cd = @plant_cd
AND e.equipment_class_cd = @equipment_class_cd
AND (e.equipment_cd = @equipment_cd OR @equipment_cd IS NULL)
AND ISNULL(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date) BETWEEN @fromdate AND @todate

ORDER BY po.plant_cd, e.equipment_cd, ISNULL(pos.actual_start_date,pos.expected_start_date)

storedProcedures.name: csp_conditions_search_for_conflicting
storedProcedures.definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [zz_draft].[csp_conditions_search_for_conflicting] 

AS
-- Alternative: Simple query version (without stored procedure)
-- This finds all conflicting rule pairs
WITH ConflictCheck AS (
    SELECT 
        c1.id as rule1_id,
        c1.specification_set_cd as spec_set_1,
        c2.id as rule2_id,
        c2.specification_set_cd as spec_set_2--,
        --c1.condition_1 as r1_c1, c1.condition_2 as r1_c2, c1.condition_3 as r1_c3,
        --c2.condition_1 as r2_c1, c2.condition_2 as r2_c2, c2.condition_3 as r2_c3
        -- Add more condition columns as needed
    FROM [ipc].[specification_set_condition] c1
    CROSS JOIN [ipc].[specification_set_condition] c2  
    WHERE c1.id < c2.id
	and c1.material_id is null and c2.material_id is null
	and c1.[customer_product_cd] is null and c2.[customer_product_cd] is null
	  AND c1.plant_cd = 'BOR' and c1.plant_cd = c2.plant_cd
      AND c1.specification_set_cd != c2.specification_set_cd
	  and c1.test_mode_cd is null and c1.test_cd is null and c1.test_type_cd = 'Dimensional'  
	  and c2.test_mode_cd is null and c2.test_cd is null and c2.test_type_cd = 'Dimensional'  
	  and c1.is_active = 1 and c2.is_active = 1
	  and c1.priority = c2.priority
      -- Check if all conditions are compatible (NULL = wildcard)
      AND (c1.[customer_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[customer_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[customer_cd] = c2.[customer_cd])
      AND (c1.[customer_cd_st] IS NULL OR c2.[customer_cd_st] IS NULL OR c1.[customer_cd_st] = c2.[customer_cd_st])
      AND (c1.[customer_product_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[customer_product_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[customer_product_cd] = c2.[customer_product_cd])
      AND (c1.[material_id] IS NULL OR c2.[material_id] IS NULL OR c1.[material_id] = c2.[material_id])
      AND (c1.[product_type_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[product_type_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[product_type_cd] = c2.[product_type_cd])
      AND (c1.[size_design_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[size_design_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[size_design_cd] = c2.[size_design_cd])
      AND (c1.[pin_design_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[pin_design_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[pin_design_cd] = c2.[pin_design_cd])
      AND (c1.[psn_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[psn_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[psn_cd] = c2.[psn_cd])
      AND (c1.[body_color_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[body_color_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[body_color_cd] = c2.[body_color_cd])
      AND (c1.[cap_color_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[cap_color_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[cap_color_cd] = c2.[cap_color_cd])
	  AND (c1.[polymer_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[polymer_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[polymer_cd] = c2.[polymer_cd])
	  AND (c1.[lod_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[lod_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[lod_cd] = c2.[lod_cd])
	  AND (c1.[pin_treatment_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[pin_treatment_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[pin_treatment_cd] = c2.[pin_treatment_cd])
	  AND (c1.[surface_treatment_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[surface_treatment_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[surface_treatment_cd] = c2.[surface_treatment_cd])
	  AND (c1.[weight_spec_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[weight_spec_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[weight_spec_cd] = c2.[weight_spec_cd])
	  AND (c1.[manufacturing_type_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[manufacturing_type_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[manufacturing_type_cd] = c2.[manufacturing_type_cd])

	  AND (c1.[material_group_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[material_group_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[material_group_cd] = c2.[material_group_cd])
	  AND (c1.[product_family_cd] IS NULL OR c2.[product_family_cd] IS NULL OR c1.[product_family_cd] = c2.[product_family_cd])
	  AND (c1.[is_printed] IS NULL OR c2.[is_printed] IS NULL OR c1.[is_printed] = c2.[is_printed])

CREATE PROCEDURE [zz_draft].[csp_import_specifications_from_upload_tables] 

AS
SELECT *   FROM [ipc].[specification_set] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
SELECT *   FROM [ipc].[specification_set_condition] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
SELECT *   FROM [ipc].[specification_set_limit] where plant_cd = 'SCL'

SELECT *   FROM zz_draft.[specification_set_for_upload] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
SELECT *   FROM zz_draft.[specification_set_condition_for_upload] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
SELECT *   FROM zz_draft.[specification_set_limit_for_upload] where plant_cd = 'SCL'

/*
DELETE FROM [ipc].[specification_set] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
DELETE FROM [ipc].[specification_set_condition] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
DELETE FROM [ipc].[specification_set_limit] where plant_cd = 'SCL'
*/

---------------------import specification sets
IF 1 = 2
BEGIN
	-- inactivate those who are not in the upload table
	UPDATE [ipc].[specification_set] 
	SET [specification_set].is_active = 0
	WHERE plant_cd = 'SCL'
	AND not exists (select * FROM [zz_draft].specification_set_for_upload ssu WHERE  ssu.plant_cd = [specification_set].plant_cd and ssu.specification_set_cd = [specification_set].specification_set_cd)

	--insert those who do not exist yet in the specification set table
	INSERT INTO [ipc].[specification_set]
			   ([plant_cd]
			   ,[specification_set_cd]
			   ,[description]
			   ,[is_active]
			   ,[created_date]
			   ,[last_edit_date]
			   ,[last_edit_user_cd])
	SELECT plant_cd, specification_set_cd, description, 1
		 ,getutcdate() 
		 ,getutcdate() 
		 ,'upload'
	  FROM [zz_draft].specification_set_for_upload
	  WHERE not exists (select * FROM [ipc].[specification_set] WHERE  specification_set_for_upload.plant_cd = [specification_set].plant_cd and specification_set_for_upload.specification_set_cd = [specification_set].specification_set_cd)


	-- inactivate those who are not in the upload table
	UPDATE [ipc].[specification_set] 
	SET [specification_set].description = specification_set_for_upload.description
	FROM [zz_draft].specification_set_for_upload
	WHERE [specification_set].plant_cd = 'SCL'
	AND [specification_set].plant_cd = specification_set_for_upload.plant_cd and specification_set.specification_set_cd = specification_set_for_upload.specification_set_cd
	AND specification_set.description <> specification_set_for_upload.description


END

INSERT INTO [ipc].[specification_set_condition]
           (   [plant_cd]           ,[priority]           ,[specification_set_cd]           ,[test_mode_cd]           ,[test_type_cd]           ,[test_cd]
           ,[customer_cd]           ,[customer_cd_st]           ,[customer_product_cd]           ,[material_id]           ,[psn_cd]
           ,[size_design_cd]           ,[pin_design_cd]           ,[body_color_cd]           ,[cap_color_cd]           ,[polymer_cd]
           ,[lod_cd]           ,[pin_treatment_cd]           ,[surface_treatment_cd]           ,[weight_spec_cd]
           ,[manufacturing_type_cd]           ,[equipment_model]           ,[material_group_cd]           ,[product_family_cd]           ,[is_printed]
           ,[is_active]           ,[created_date]           ,[last_edit_date]           ,[last_edit_user_cd])
SELECT
   u.[plant_cd]      ,[priority]      ,u.[specification_set_cd]      ,[test_mode_cd]      ,[test_type_cd]      ,[test_cd]
      ,[customer_cd]      ,[customer_cd_st]      ,[customer_product_cd]          ,[material_id]  ,[psn_cd]      
	  ,[size_design_cd]      ,[pin_design_cd]      ,[body_color_cd]      ,[cap_color_cd]      ,[polymer_cd]
      ,[lod_cd]      ,[pin_treatment_cd]      ,[surface_treatment_cd]      ,[weight_spec_cd]
      ,[manufacturing_type_cd]      ,[equipment_model]      ,[material_group_cd]      ,[product_family_cd]      ,[is_printed]
      ,1		 ,getutcdate() 		 ,getutcdate() 		 ,'upload'
	    FROM [zz_draft].[specification_set_condition_for_upload] u
		 JOIN ipc.specification_set  SS ON U.specification_set_cd = ss.specification_set_cd



END
